---- AE duration (days) ---- */\n        if not missing(aestdtc) and not missing(aeendtc) then do;\n            aestdt = input(aestdtc, yymmdd10.);\n            aeendt = input(aeendtc, yymmdd10.);\n            aedur  = aeendt - aestdt + 1;\n            if aedur < 1 then aedur = 1; /* Minimum 1-day duration */\n        end;\n        else do;\n            aestdt = .;\n            aeendt = .;\n            aedur  = .;\n        end;\n\n        /* ---- Onset study day relative to first dose ---- */\n        if not missing(aestdtc) and not missing(rfxstdtc) then do;\n            rfxstdt_ae = input(rfxstdtc, yymmdd10.);\n            aestdy = aestdt - rfxstdt_ae;\n            if aestdy >= 0 then aestdy = aestdy + 1;\n        end;\n        else aestdy = .;\n\n        /* ---- Relationship to study drug (numeric) ---- */\n        select (upcase(aerel));\n            when ('NOT RELATED')        aereln = 0;\n            when ('UNLIKELY')           aereln = 1;\n            when ('POSSIBLE')           aereln = 2;\n            when ('PROBABLE')           aereln = 3;\n            when ('DEFINITE')           aereln = 4;\n            otherwise                   aereln = .;\n        end;\n\n        /* ---- Treatment-emergent AE flag ---- */\n        if aestdy > 0 or missing(aestdy) then trtemfl = 'Y';\n        else trtemfl = 'N';\n\n        format aestdt aeendt date9.;\n\n        drop rfxstdt_ae;\n    run;\n\n    /* ---- Capture ADAE record count ---- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :adae_nobs trimmed from adam.adae;\n        select count(distinct usubjid) into :adae_nsubj trimmed from adam.adae;\n    quit;\n\n    %put NOTE: ADAE derivation complete. &adae_nobs AE records for &adae_nsubj subjects.;\n    %if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n        %put ERROR: ADAE derivation failed with SYSERR=&syserr.;\n        %let analysis_rc = 1;\n    %end;\n\n%mend derive_adae;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 4: Efficacy Analysis                                              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: efficacy_analysis                                               */\n/*   Performs primary efficacy analysis based on the specified endpoint    */\n/*   and statistical method. Supports ANCOVA (PROC GLM) for continuous    */\n/*   endpoints and logistic regression (PROC LOGISTIC) for binary.        */\n/*   Generates descriptive statistics by treatment arm.                    */\n/*   Parameters:                                                          */\n/*     endpoint= : Variable name of the primary endpoint                 */\n/*     method=   : ANCOVA or LOGISTIC                                    */\n/*     covars=   : Space-separated list of covariates                    */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro efficacy_analysis(endpoint=, method=, covars=agegr1n sexn);\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================================;\n    %put NOTE: efficacy_analysis: Endpoint=&endpoint. | Method=&method.;\n    %put NOTE: Covariates: &covars.;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================================;\n\n    /* ---- Descriptive statistics by treatment arm ---- */\n    proc means data=adam.adsl n mean std median min max maxdec=2\n               nway noprint;\n        where ittfl = 'Y' and not missing(&endpoint.);\n        class trt01pn trt01p;\n        var &endpoint.;\n        output out=work.desc_&endpoint.\n               n=n mean=mean std=std median=median min=min max=max;\n    run;\n\n    /* Print descriptive statistics for review */\n    title "Table 14.2.1: Descriptive Statistics \u2014 &endpoint. by Treatment";\n    title2 "Study &study_id. | ITT Population | SAP v&sap_version.";\n    proc print data=work.desc_&endpoint. noobs label;\n        var trt01p n mean std median min max;\n        label trt01p = 'Treatment'\n              n      = 'N'\n              mean   = 'Mean'\n              std    = 'Std Dev'\n              median = 'Median'\n              min    = 'Minimum'\n              max    = 'Maximum';\n    run;\n    title;\n\n    /* ---- Primary analysis: method-dependent ---- */\n    %if %upcase(&method.) = ANCOVA %then %do;\n\n        /* ANCOVA via PROC GLM with treatment as factor and covariates */\n        %put NOTE: Running ANCOVA for &endpoint. via PROC GLM.;\n\n        proc glm data=adam.adsl plots=none;\n            where ittfl = 'Y' and not missing(&endpoint.);\n            class trt01pn &covars.;\n            model &endpoint. = trt01pn &covars. / ss3 solution;\n            lsmeans trt01pn / pdiff cl adjust=tukey;\n            ods output LSMeans      = work.lsmeans_&endpoint.\n                       Diff         = work.lsdiff_&endpoint.\n                       OverallANOVA = work.anova_&endpoint.;\n        quit;\n\n        /* ---- Extract p-value for treatment effect ---- */\n        data _null_;\n            set work.anova_&endpoint.;\n            where upcase(source) = 'TRT01PN';\n            call symputx('pval_trt', put(probf, pvalue6.4), 'G');\n        run;\n\n        %put NOTE: ANCOVA p-value for treatment effect: &pval_trt.;\n\n    %end;\n    %else %if %upcase(&method.) = LOGISTIC %then %do;\n\n        /* Logistic regression via PROC LOGISTIC for binary endpoint */\n        %put NOTE: Running logistic regression for &endpoint. via PROC LOGISTIC.;\n\n        proc logistic data=adam.adsl descending;\n            where ittfl = 'Y' and not missing(&endpoint.);\n            class trt01pn(ref='3') &covars. / param=ref;\n            model &endpoint. = trt01pn &covars.\n                  / lackfit rsquare stb;\n            oddsratio trt01pn;\n            ods output OddsRatios         = work.or_&endpoint.\n                       ParameterEstimates = work.parms_&endpoint.\n                       GlobalTests        = work.global_&endpoint.;\n        run;\n\n        /* ---- Extract odds ratio for treatment ---- */\n        data _null_;\n            set work.or_&endpoint.;\n            if _n_ = 1 then do;\n                call symputx('or_estimate', put(oddsratioest, 8.3), 'G');\n                call symputx('or_lower', put(lowercl, 8.3), 'G');\n                call symputx('or_upper', put(uppercl, 8.3), 'G');\n            end;\n        run;\n\n        %put NOTE: Odds Ratio (95%% CI): &or_estimate. (&or_lower., &or_upper.);\n\n    %end;\n    %else %do;\n        %put ERROR: Unknown analysis method &method.. Valid: ANCOVA, LOGISTIC.;\n        %let analysis_rc = 1;\n    %end;\n\n    %if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n        %put ERROR: Efficacy analysis for &endpoint. failed (SYSERR=&syserr.).;\n        %let analysis_rc = 1;\n    %end;\n\n%mend efficacy_analysis;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 5: Safety Tables \u2014 Adverse Event Incidence                        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: safety_tables                                                   */\n/*   Generates AE incidence tables by system organ class and preferred    */\n/*   term. Iterates over AE categories using %DO loop. Computes rate     */\n/*   differences between active treatment and placebo.                    */\n/*   Produces Table 14.3 series per SAP.                                  */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro safety_tables;\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================================;\n    %put NOTE: safety_tables: Generating AE incidence tables.;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================================;\n\n    /* ---- Define AE categories to tabulate ---- */\n    %let ncat = 4;\n    %let cat1 = TEAE;\n    %let cat2 = SAE;\n    %let cat3 = DRUG_RELATED;\n    %let cat4 = LEADING_TO_DISC;\n    %let catlab1 = Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events;\n    %let catlab2 = Serious Adverse Events;\n    %let catlab3 = Drug-Related Adverse Events;\n    %let catlab4 = AEs Leading to Discontinuation;\n\n    /* ---- Get denominator counts per treatment arm ---- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(distinct case when trt01pn=1 then usubjid end),\n               count(distinct case when trt01pn=2 then usubjid end),\n               count(distinct case when trt01pn=3 then usubjid end)\n        into :n_trt1 trimmed, :n_trt2 trimmed, :n_plac trimmed\n        from adam.adsl\n        where saffl = 'Y';\n    quit;\n\n    %put NOTE: Safety population: TRT1=&n_trt1 | TRT2=&n_trt2 | Placebo=&n_plac;\n\n    /* ---- Loop over AE categories ---- */\n    %do i = 1 %to &ncat.;\n\n        %let thiscat  = &&cat&i.;\n        %let thislab  = &&catlab&i.;\n\n        %put NOTE: Processing category &i.: &thiscat. \u2014 &thislab.;\n\n        /* ---- Apply category-specific filter ---- */\n        data work.ae_filtered_&i.;\n            set adam.adae;\n            %if &thiscat. = TEAE %then %do;\n                where trtemfl = 'Y';\n            %end;\n            %else %if &thiscat. = SAE %then %do;\n                where trtemfl = 'Y' and aeser_flag = 'Y';\n            %end;\n            %else %if &thiscat. = DRUG_RELATED %then %do;\n                where trtemfl = 'Y' and aereln >= 2;\n            %end;\n            %else %if &thiscat. = LEADING_TO_DISC %then %do;\n                where trtemfl = 'Y' and upcase(aeacn) = 'DRUG WITHDRAWN';\n            %end;\n        run;\n\n        /* ---- Frequency table by SOC and preferred term ---- */\n        proc freq data=work.ae_filtered_&i. noprint;\n            tables aebodsys * aedecod * trt01pn / out=work.ae_freq_&i.\n                                                    outpct sparse;\n        run;\n\n        /* ---- Compute incidence rates and rate differences ---- */\n        proc sort data=work.ae_freq_&i.;\n            by aebodsys aedecod trt01pn;\n        run;\n\n        data work.ae_rates_&i.;\n            set work.ae_freq_&i.;\n            by aebodsys aedecod trt01pn;\n\n            length rate 8 denom 8;\n\n            /* Assign denominator based on treatment */\n            select (trt01pn);\n                when (1) denom = input("&n_trt1.", 8.);\n                when (2) denom = input("&n_trt2.", 8.);\n                when (3) denom = input("&n_plac.", 8.);\n                otherwise denom = .;\n            end;\n\n            /* Incidence rate as percentage */\n            if denom > 0 then rate = (count / denom) * 100;\n            else rate = .;\n\n            format rate 6.1;\n        run;\n\n        /* ---- Transpose to one row per SOC/PT with columns per trt ---- */\n        proc transpose data=work.ae_rates_&i.\n                       out=work.ae_wide_&i.(drop=_name_)\n                       prefix=rate_;\n            by aebodsys aedecod;\n            id trt01pn;\n            var rate;\n        run;\n\n        /* ---- Calculate rate difference (active vs placebo) ---- */\n        data output.table_14_3_&i. (label="Table 14.3.&i.: &thislab.");\n            set work.ae_wide_&i.;\n\n            /* Rate difference: active arm 1 vs placebo */\n            if not missing(rate_1) and not missing(rate_3) then\n                rate_diff_1 = rate_1 - rate_3;\n            else rate_diff_1 = .;\n\n            /* Rate difference: active arm 2 vs placebo */\n            if not missing(rate_2) and not missing(rate_3) then\n                rate_diff_2 = rate_2 - rate_3;\n            else rate_diff_2 = .;\n\n            label aebodsys    = 'System Organ Class'\n                  aedecod     = 'Preferred Term'\n                  rate_1      = "XYZ 100mg (N=&n_trt1.) %"\n                  rate_2      = "XYZ 200mg (N=&n_trt2.) %"\n                  rate_3      = "Placebo (N=&n_plac.) %"\n                  rate_diff_1 = 'Rate Diff (100mg - Placebo)'\n                  rate_diff_2 = 'Rate Diff (200mg - Placebo)';\n\n            format rate_diff_1 rate_diff_2 6.1;\n        run;\n\n        %put NOTE: Table 14.3.&i.: &thislab. \u2014 complete.;\n\n    %end; /* End %DO loop over categories */\n\n    %if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n        %put ERROR: Safety tables generation failed (SYSERR=&syserr.).;\n        %let analysis_rc = 1;\n    %end;\n\n%mend safety_tables;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 6: Main Program Execution                                         */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n%put NOTE: Main program execution begins: &run_dt. &run_tm.;\n%put NOTE: Study: &study_id. | SAP: v&sap_version.;\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n\n/* ---- Step 1: Derive ADSL ---- */\n%derive_adsl(study=&study_id.);\n\n/* ---- Step 2: Derive ADAE ---- */\n%derive_adae(study=&study_id.);\n\n/* ---- Step 3: Primary efficacy \u2014 continuous endpoint (ANCOVA) ---- */\n%efficacy_analysis(endpoint=chg_primary, method=ANCOVA,\n                   covars=agegr1n sexn baseline);\n\n/* ---- Step 4: Secondary efficacy \u2014 binary endpoint (Logistic) ---- */\n%efficacy_analysis(endpoint=responder_flag, method=LOGISTIC,\n                   covars=agegr1n sexn);\n\n/* ---- Step 5: Safety tables ---- */\n%safety_tables;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 7: Demographics Table (Table 14.1) via PROC SQL                   */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* ---- Table 14.1: Summary of Demographics and Baseline Characteristics ---- */\nproc sql;\n    create table output.table_14_1 as\n    select trt01p                                            as treatment\n          ,count(distinct usubjid)                           as n_subjects\n          ,mean(age)                                         as mean_age     format=5.1\n          ,std(age)                                          as sd_age       format=5.2\n          ,median(age)                                       as median_age   format=5.1\n          ,min(age)                                          as min_age\n          ,max(age)                                          as max_age\n          ,sum(case when sex='M' then 1 else 0 end)         as n_male\n          ,calculated n_male / calculated n_subjects * 100   as pct_male     format=5.1\n          ,sum(case when sex='F' then 1 else 0 end)         as n_female\n          ,calculated n_female / calculated n_subjects * 100 as pct_female   format=5.1\n          ,sum(case when racen=1 then 1 else 0 end)         as n_white\n          ,sum(case when racen=2 then 1 else 0 end)         as n_black\n          ,sum(case when racen=3 then 1 else 0 end)         as n_asian\n          ,sum(case when racen>=4 then 1 else 0 end)        as n_other_race\n          ,mean(studydur)                                    as mean_studydur format=6.1\n          ,mean(trtdur)                                      as mean_trtdur   format=6.1\n          ,sum(case when ittfl='Y' then 1 else 0 end)       as n_itt\n          ,sum(case when ppfl='Y' then 1 else 0 end)        as n_pp\n          ,sum(case when saffl='Y' then 1 else 0 end)       as n_safety\n          ,sum(case when complfl='Y' then 1 else 0 end)     as n_completed\n    from adam.adsl\n    group by trt01p\n    order by trt01p;\nquit;\n\n/* ---- Print Table 14.1 ---- */\ntitle "Table 14.1: Summary of Demographics and Baseline Characteristics";\ntitle2 "Study &study_id. | ITT Population | SAP v&sap_version.";\nproc print data=output.table_14_1 noobs label;\n    var treatment n_subjects mean_age sd_age pct_male pct_female\n        n_white n_black n_asian n_other_race\n        mean_studydur mean_trtdur n_itt n_pp n_safety n_completed;\n    label treatment    = 'Treatment Arm'\n          n_subjects   = 'N'\n          mean_age     = 'Mean Age'\n          sd_age       = 'SD Age'\n          pct_male     = '% Male'\n          pct_female   = '% Female'\n          n_white      = 'N White'\n          n_black      = 'N Black'\n          n_asian      = 'N Asian'\n          n_other_race = 'N Other'\n          mean_studydur = 'Mean Study Duration'\n          mean_trtdur   = 'Mean Trt Duration'\n          n_itt        = 'N (ITT)'\n          n_pp         = 'N (PP)'\n          n_safety     = 'N (Safety)'\n          n_completed  = 'N (Completed)';\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 8: Error Handling and Final Status                                 */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%if &analysis_rc. ne 0 or &syserr. ne 0 %then %do;\n\n    %put ERROR: ========================================================;\n    %put ERROR: Clinical trial analysis pipeline FAILED.;\n    %put ERROR: analysis_rc=&analysis_rc. | syserr=&syserr.;\n    %put ERROR: Study=&study_id. | Run date=&run_dt.;\n    %put ERROR: ========================================================;\n\n    /* Write error notification file for monitoring system */\n    data _null_;\n        file '/clinical/XYZ301/logs/analysis_error.flag';\n        put "STATUS=FAILED";\n        put "STUDY=&study_id.";\n        put "RUN_DATE=&run_dt.";\n        put "RUN_TIME=&run_tm.";\n        put "ANALYSIS_RC=&analysis_rc.";\n        put "SYSERR=&syserr.";\n        put "PROGRAM=gsh_04_clinical_trial.sas";\n    run;\n\n    /* Notify biostatistics team via email */\n    filename mailto email\n        to='biostat-team@pharmacorp.com'\n        subject="ALERT: Study &study_id. analysis pipeline FAILED"\n        type='text/plain';\n\n    data _null_;\n        file mailto;\n        put "Clinical trial analysis pipeline failed.";\n        put "Study: &study_id.";\n        put "Program: gsh_04_clinical_trial.sas";\n        put "Run date/time: &run_dt. &run_tm.";\n        put "Return code: &analysis_rc.";\n        put "Please review the SAS log immediately.";\n    run;\n\n    filename mailto clear;\n\n%end;\n%else %do;\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Clinical trial analysis pipeline completed SUCCESSFULLY.;\n    %put NOTE: Study=&study_id. | Run date=&run_dt. &run_tm.;\n    %put NOTE: ADSL N=&adsl_nobs | ADAE N=&adae_nobs (&adae_nsubj subj);\n    %put NOTE: ========================================================;\n\n    /* Write success flag file */\n    data _null_;\n        file '/clinical/XYZ301/logs/analysis_complete.flag';\n        put "STATUS=SUCCESS";\n        put "STUDY=&study_id.";\n        put "RUN_DATE=&run_dt.";\n        put "RUN_TIME=&run_tm.";\n        put "ADSL_N=&adsl_nobs.";\n        put "ADAE_N=&adae_nobs.";\n        put "PROGRAM=gsh_04_clinical_trial.sas";\n    run;\n\n%end;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 9: Cleanup and Reset                                              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* ---- Delete intermediate work datasets ---- */\nproc datasets library=work nolist nowarn;\n    delete dm_sorted ds_sorted rand_sorted\n           adsl_for_ae ae_sorted\n           ae_filtered_: ae_freq_: ae_rates_: ae_wide_:\n           desc_: lsmeans_: lsdiff_: anova_:\n           or_: parms_: global_:;\nquit;\n\n/* ---- Reset options to defaults ---- */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n%put NOTE: Program gsh_04_clinical_trial.sas complete.;\n%put NOTE: End time: %sysfunc(datetime(), datetime20.);\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n-gold_meta18]
[PASS] test_no_lineage_violations_in_deterministic[gsh_05_fraud_detection.sas-/******************************************************************************\n * Program Name : gsh_05_fraud_detection.sas\n * Author       : Financial Crime Prevention Unit \u2014 Transaction Monitoring\n * Department   : Anti-Money Laundering & Fraud Analytics\n * Version      : 2.3\n * Created      : 2025-03-10\n * Modified     : 2026-02-19\n * Purpose      : Real-time transaction fraud detection system. Implements\n *                multi-layer fraud detection pipeline including feature\n *                engineering (velocity, amount, behavioral), rule-based\n *                screening (12 configurable rules), logistic regression\n *                scoring model, and automated alert generation with\n *                routing to BLOCK / REVIEW / PASS queues.\n * Input        : txn.transactions, txn.transaction_history,\n *                cust.customer_profiles, cust.account_details,\n *                mdl.model_coefficients, mdl.score_thresholds\n * Output       : alert.fraud_alerts, alert.blocked_transactions,\n *                alert.review_queue, alert.daily_fraud_metrics\n * Dependencies : fraud_utils.sas (shared fraud detection utilities)\n * Compliance   : PCI-DSS 3.2.1, BSA/AML, Reg E\n * Change Log   :\n *   2025-03-10  v1.0  Initial feature engineering pipeline     (M. Torres)\n *   2025-05-22  v1.1  Added rule engine with 6 rules            (M. Torres)\n *   2025-07-14  v1.2  Logistic regression scoring model         (S. Kim)\n *   2025-09-30  v1.5  Expanded to 12 rules, velocity windows   (M. Torres)\n *   2025-11-18  v2.0  Alert generation and routing              (S. Kim)\n *   2026-01-05  v2.2  Hash lookup for merchant blacklist        (M. Torres)\n *   2026-02-19  v2.3  Error handling and daily metrics          (S. Kim)\n ******************************************************************************/\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 1: Environment Setup and Library Definitions                      */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\noptions mprint symbolgen mlogic nocenter ls=150 ps=60\n        validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i;\n\n/* --- Transaction data library (current day + history) --- */\nlibname txn '/fraud/data/transactions'\n            access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Customer and account reference data --- */\nlibname cust '/fraud/data/customer'\n             access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Model artifacts: coefficients, thresholds, blacklists --- */\nlibname mdl '/fraud/models/production';\n\n/* --- Alert output library --- */\nlibname alert '/fraud/output/alerts';\n\n/* --- Global parameters for this fraud detection run --- */\n%let run_id        = FR_%sysfunc(today(), yymmddn8.)_%sysfunc(time(), time5.);\n%let process_date  = %sysfunc(today(), date9.);\n%let score_version = LR_v2.3;\n%let fraud_rc      = 0;\n%let block_count   = 0;\n%let review_count  = 0;\n%let pass_count    = 0;\n%let total_alerts  = 0;\n\n/* Load shared fraud detection utility macros */\n%include '/fraud/macros/fraud_utils.sas';\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 2: Feature Engineering Macro                                      */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO feature_engineering\n  Purpose: Build velocity-based and amount-based features for each\n           transaction. Uses RETAIN for running accumulators, LAG for\n           inter-transaction timing, and a %DO loop to compute features\n           across multiple time windows (1h, 6h, 24h, 72h).\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro feature_engineering(input_ds=, output_ds=, history_ds=);\n\n    /* Step 1: Sort current transactions by account and timestamp */\n    proc sort data=&input_ds out=work._txn_sorted;\n        by account_id transaction_datetime;\n    run;\n\n    /* Step 2: Sort historical transactions for windowed join */\n    proc sort data=&history_ds out=work._hist_sorted;\n        by account_id transaction_datetime;\n    run;\n\n    /* Step 3: Combine current and historical for windowed features */\n    data work._txn_combined;\n        set work._hist_sorted(in=hist)\n            work._txn_sorted(in=curr);\n        by account_id transaction_datetime;\n        is_current = curr;\n    run;\n\n    /* Step 4: Build features using RETAIN and LAG across accounts */\n    data &output_ds(where=(is_current = 1));\n        set work._txn_combined;\n        by account_id;\n\n        /* ---- Retained accumulators for velocity windows ---- */\n        retain txn_count_1h txn_count_6h txn_count_24h txn_count_72h\n               amt_sum_1h amt_sum_6h amt_sum_24h amt_sum_72h\n               amt_max_1h amt_max_6h amt_max_24h amt_max_72h\n               unique_merchants_24h distinct_countries_24h\n               last_txn_datetime last_txn_amount\n               acct_running_total acct_running_count;\n\n        /* ---- LAG variables for inter-transaction gap ---- */\n        lag_datetime = lag(transaction_datetime);\n        lag_amount   = lag(transaction_amount);\n        lag_merchant = lag(merchant_id);\n\n        /* Reset all accumulators at the start of each account */\n        if first.account_id then do;\n            txn_count_1h  = 0; txn_count_6h  = 0;\n            txn_count_24h = 0; txn_count_72h = 0;\n            amt_sum_1h  = 0; amt_sum_6h  = 0;\n            amt_sum_24h = 0; amt_sum_72h = 0;\n            amt_max_1h  = 0; amt_max_6h  = 0;\n            amt_max_24h = 0; amt_max_72h = 0;\n            unique_merchants_24h   = 0;\n            distinct_countries_24h = 0;\n            last_txn_datetime = .;\n            last_txn_amount   = .;\n            acct_running_total = 0;\n            acct_running_count = 0;\n            lag_datetime = .;\n            lag_amount   = .;\n        end;\n\n        /* Compute time difference in hours from previous transaction */\n        if last_txn_datetime ne . then\n            hours_since_last = intck('hour', last_txn_datetime,\n                                     transaction_datetime);\n        else\n            hours_since_last = 999;\n\n        /* ---- %DO loop: build windowed features for 1h, 6h, 24h, 72h ---- */\n        %let window1 = 1;\n        %let window2 = 6;\n        %let window3 = 24;\n        %let window4 = 72;\n\n        %do i = 1 %to 4;\n            /* Increment transaction count for this window */\n            if hours_since_last <= &&window&i then\n                txn_count_&&window&i = txn_count_&&window&i + 1;\n\n            /* Accumulate transaction amount for this window */\n            if hours_since_last <= &&window&i then\n                amt_sum_&&window&i = amt_sum_&&window&i + transaction_amount;\n\n            /* Track maximum single transaction in window */\n            if hours_since_last <= &&window&i then\n                amt_max_&&window&i = max(amt_max_&&window&i, transaction_amount);\n        %end;\n\n        /* ---- Derived ratio features ---- */\n        if acct_running_count > 0 then\n            avg_txn_amount = acct_running_total / acct_running_count;\n        else\n            avg_txn_amount = transaction_amount;\n\n        /* Amount deviation from account historical average */\n        if avg_txn_amount > 0 then\n            amount_deviation = transaction_amount / avg_txn_amount;\n        else\n            amount_deviation = 1;\n\n        /* Velocity ratio: 1-hour count relative to 24-hour count */\n        if txn_count_24h > 0 then\n            velocity_ratio_1_24 = txn_count_1h / txn_count_24h;\n        else\n            velocity_ratio_1_24 = 0;\n\n        /* Same-merchant repeat flag within last hour */\n        if lag_merchant = merchant_id and hours_since_last <= 1 then\n            same_merchant_repeat = 1;\n        else\n            same_merchant_repeat = 0;\n\n        /* Round-amount flag (amounts like 100, 200, 500, 1000) */\n        if mod(transaction_amount, 100) = 0 and transaction_amount >= 100 then\n            round_amount_flag = 1;\n        else\n            round_amount_flag = 0;\n\n        /* Weekend / night transaction flag */\n        txn_hour = hour(timepart(transaction_datetime));\n        txn_dow  = weekday(datepart(transaction_datetime));\n        if txn_dow in (1, 7) or txn_hour < 6 or txn_hour > 22 then\n            off_hours_flag = 1;\n        else\n            off_hours_flag = 0;\n\n        /* Update running accumulators for next iteration */\n        acct_running_total = acct_running_total + transaction_amount;\n        acct_running_count = acct_running_count + 1;\n        last_txn_datetime  = transaction_datetime;\n        last_txn_amount    = transaction_amount;\n\n        /* Drop internal-only variables from output */\n        drop lag_datetime lag_amount lag_merchant\n             last_txn_datetime last_txn_amount\n             acct_running_total acct_running_count\n             is_current;\n    run;\n\n    /* Step 5: Merge customer profile features onto featured transactions */\n    proc sort data=&output_ds;\n        by account_id;\n    run;\n\n    data &output_ds;\n        merge &output_ds(in=a)\n              cust.customer_profiles(keep=account_id customer_segment\n                   account_age_days avg_monthly_spend credit_score\n                   country_code risk_rating\n                   in=b);\n        by account_id;\n        if a;\n\n        /* Compute account tenure risk: newer accounts are riskier */\n        if account_age_days < 30 then tenure_risk = 3;\n        else if account_age_days < 90 then tenure_risk = 2;\n        else if account_age_days < 365 then tenure_risk = 1;\n        else tenure_risk = 0;\n\n        /* Spending anomaly: compare 24h total to daily average */\n        if avg_monthly_spend > 0 then\n            spend_anomaly = amt_sum_24h / (avg_monthly_spend / 30);\n        else\n            spend_anomaly = 0;\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: Feature engineering complete for &input_ds;\n\n%mend feature_engineering;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 3: Rule Engine Macro                                              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO rule_engine\n  Purpose: Apply 12 configurable fraud detection rules to each\n           transaction. Each rule assigns a risk score contribution\n           and a rule-hit flag. Uses IF/THEN/ELSE cascading logic\n           and PROC SQL with INTO: for aggregate rule hit counts.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro rule_engine(input_ds=, output_ds=);\n\n    data &output_ds;\n        set &input_ds;\n\n        /* Initialize rule hit flags and risk score accumulators */\n        array rule_hit{12} rule_hit_1-rule_hit_12;\n        do _r = 1 to 12;\n            rule_hit{_r} = 0;\n        end;\n        rule_score = 0;\n        rule_count = 0;\n\n        /* --- Rule 1: High-value single transaction (> $5,000) --- */\n        if transaction_amount > 5000 then do;\n            rule_hit_1 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 150;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 2: Rapid-fire velocity (>5 txns in 1 hour) --- */\n        if txn_count_1h > 5 then do;\n            rule_hit_2 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 200;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 3: Amount deviation > 5x account average --- */\n        if amount_deviation > 5 then do;\n            rule_hit_3 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 180;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 4: Off-hours high-value transaction --- */\n        if off_hours_flag = 1 and transaction_amount > 2000 then do;\n            rule_hit_4 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 120;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 5: New account with large transaction --- */\n        if tenure_risk >= 2 and transaction_amount > 1000 then do;\n            rule_hit_5 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 160;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 6: Same merchant repeat within 1 hour --- */\n        if same_merchant_repeat = 1 and txn_count_1h > 3 then do;\n            rule_hit_6 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 140;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 7: Cross-border transaction with high amount --- */\n        if country_code ne transaction_country\n           and transaction_amount > 3000 then do;\n            rule_hit_7 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 170;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 8: Round-amount structuring pattern --- */\n        if round_amount_flag = 1 and txn_count_24h > 3 then do;\n            rule_hit_8 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 130;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 9: 24-hour cumulative amount exceeds $10,000 (BSA/AML) --- */\n        if amt_sum_24h > 10000 then do;\n            rule_hit_9 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 250;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 10: Spending anomaly > 10x monthly average --- */\n        if spend_anomaly > 10 then do;\n            rule_hit_10 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 190;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 11: 72-hour velocity spike (>20 txns) --- */\n        if txn_count_72h > 20 then do;\n            rule_hit_11 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 110;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Rule 12: High-risk customer with elevated activity --- */\n        if risk_rating = 'HIGH' and txn_count_24h > 5\n           and transaction_amount > 1000 then do;\n            rule_hit_12 = 1;\n            rule_score = rule_score + 220;\n            rule_count = rule_count + 1;\n        end;\n\n        /* Cap combined rule score at 1000 */\n        if rule_score > 1000 then rule_score = 1000;\n\n        drop _r;\n    run;\n\n    /* Compute aggregate rule hit counts and store in macro variables */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select sum(rule_hit_1),  sum(rule_hit_2),  sum(rule_hit_3),\n               sum(rule_hit_4),  sum(rule_hit_5),  sum(rule_hit_6),\n               sum(rule_hit_7),  sum(rule_hit_8),  sum(rule_hit_9),\n               sum(rule_hit_10), sum(rule_hit_11), sum(rule_hit_12),\n               sum(rule_count > 0)\n        into :rule1_hits, :rule2_hits, :rule3_hits,\n             :rule4_hits, :rule5_hits, :rule6_hits,\n             :rule7_hits, :rule8_hits, :rule9_hits,\n             :rule10_hits, :rule11_hits, :rule12_hits,\n             :total_rule_hits\n        from &output_ds;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Log rule hit summary to SAS log */\n    %put NOTE: ---- Rule Engine Summary ----;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 1  (High Value):          &rule1_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 2  (Rapid Velocity):      &rule2_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 3  (Amount Deviation):    &rule3_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 4  (Off-Hours High):      &rule4_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 5  (New Account Large):   &rule5_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 6  (Merchant Repeat):     &rule6_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 7  (Cross-Border):        &rule7_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 8  (Round Amount):        &rule8_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 9  (BSA Threshold):       &rule9_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 10 (Spend Anomaly):       &rule10_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 11 (72h Velocity):        &rule11_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Rule 12 (High-Risk Customer):  &rule12_hits hits;\n    %put NOTE: Total transactions with 1+ rule hits: &total_rule_hits;\n\n%mend rule_engine;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 4: Score Model Macro                                              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO score_model\n  Purpose: Apply logistic regression model coefficients to the feature\n           vector. Computes log-odds, converts to probability via the\n           logistic function, and normalizes to a 0-1000 fraud score.\n           Blends rule score with model score using configurable weights.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro score_model(input_ds=, output_ds=, coeff_ds=);\n\n    /* Load model coefficients from reference table into macro variables */\n    data _null_;\n        set &coeff_ds;\n        call symput(compress('coeff_' || variable_name),\n                     put(coefficient, best12.));\n    run;\n\n    /* Apply logistic regression scoring to each transaction */\n    data &output_ds;\n        set &input_ds;\n\n        /* ---- Compute log-odds (linear predictor) ---- */\n        log_odds = &coeff_intercept\n            + &coeff_txn_count_1h       * txn_count_1h\n            + &coeff_txn_count_24h      * txn_count_24h\n            + &coeff_amt_sum_24h        * (amt_sum_24h / 1000)\n            + &coeff_amount_deviation   * amount_deviation\n            + &coeff_velocity_ratio     * velocity_ratio_1_24\n            + &coeff_off_hours          * off_hours_flag\n            + &coeff_tenure_risk        * tenure_risk\n            + &coeff_spend_anomaly      * min(spend_anomaly, 20)\n            + &coeff_round_amount       * round_amount_flag\n            + &coeff_same_merchant      * same_merchant_repeat;\n\n        /* ---- Convert log-odds to probability via logistic function ---- */\n        fraud_probability = 1 / (1 + exp(-log_odds));\n\n        /* ---- Normalize probability to 0-1000 scale ---- */\n        model_score = round(fraud_probability * 1000);\n\n        /* Cap model score at boundaries */\n        if model_score < 0 then model_score = 0;\n        if model_score > 1000 then model_score = 1000;\n\n        /* ---- Blend model score with rule score (60/40 weight) ---- */\n        blended_score = round(0.6 * model_score + 0.4 * rule_score);\n\n        /* Apply minimum floor: any rule hit guarantees score >= 100 */\n        if rule_count > 0 and blended_score < 100 then\n            blended_score = 100;\n\n        /* Apply override: 3+ rules triggered guarantees score >= 500 */\n        if rule_count >= 3 then\n            blended_score = max(blended_score, 500);\n\n        /* Final score capping */\n        if blended_score > 1000 then blended_score = 1000;\n\n        /* Score confidence band classification */\n        length score_confidence $10;\n        if fraud_probability >= 0.8 then score_confidence = 'VERY_HIGH';\n        else if fraud_probability >= 0.5 then score_confidence = 'HIGH';\n        else if fraud_probability >= 0.2 then score_confidence = 'MEDIUM';\n        else score_confidence = 'LOW';\n\n        /* Add scoring metadata */\n        length score_model_version $20;\n        score_model_version = "&score_version";\n        score_timestamp     = datetime();\n        format score_timestamp datetime20.;\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: Model scoring complete using version &score_version;\n\n%mend score_model;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 5: Alert Generation Macro                                         */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO alert_generation\n  Purpose: Route scored transactions into BLOCK, REVIEW, or PASS\n           queues based on configurable score thresholds. Creates\n           alert records with priority, assigned analyst queue,\n           and SLA deadlines for investigation.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro alert_generation(input_ds=, block_ds=, review_ds=, pass_ds=,\n                        alert_ds=, block_threshold=750,\n                        review_threshold=400);\n\n    /* Store configurable thresholds */\n    %let _blk_thresh = &block_threshold;\n    %let _rev_thresh = &review_threshold;\n\n    /* Route transactions to appropriate queues based on blended score */\n    data &block_ds &review_ds &pass_ds;\n        set &input_ds;\n\n        length alert_action $10 alert_priority $8\n               analyst_queue $20 sla_deadline 8;\n        format sla_deadline datetime20.;\n\n        /* ---- BLOCK: immediate transaction block (score >= 750) ---- */\n        if blended_score >= &_blk_thresh then do;\n            alert_action   = 'BLOCK';\n            alert_priority = 'CRITICAL';\n            analyst_queue  = 'FRAUD_TIER1';\n            sla_deadline   = datetime() + 3600;   /* 1-hour SLA */\n            output &block_ds;\n        end;\n\n        /* ---- REVIEW: manual review required (score >= 400) ---- */\n        else if blended_score >= &_rev_thresh then do;\n            alert_action   = 'REVIEW';\n            if blended_score >= 600 then alert_priority = 'HIGH';\n            else alert_priority = 'MEDIUM';\n            analyst_queue  = 'FRAUD_TIER2';\n            sla_deadline   = datetime() + 14400;  /* 4-hour SLA */\n            output &review_ds;\n        end;\n\n        /* ---- PASS: no action required (score < 400) ---- */\n        else do;\n            alert_action   = 'PASS';\n            alert_priority = 'LOW';\n            analyst_queue  = 'NONE';\n            sla_deadline   = .;\n            output &pass_ds;\n        end;\n    run;\n\n    /* Create consolidated alert log combining BLOCK and REVIEW */\n    data &alert_ds;\n        set &block_ds(in=blk)\n            &review_ds(in=rev);\n\n        length alert_id $30;\n        alert_id = catx('_', 'ALT', put(today(), yymmddn8.),\n                         put(_n_, z6.));\n        alert_run_id   = "&run_id";\n        alert_datetime = datetime();\n        format alert_datetime datetime20.;\n    run;\n\n    /* Capture queue counts via CALL SYMPUT for downstream reporting */\n    data _null_;\n        set &block_ds nobs=_nblk;\n        if _n_ = 1 then call symput('block_count',\n                                     strip(put(_nblk, best.)));\n        stop;\n    run;\n\n    data _null_;\n        set &review_ds nobs=_nrev;\n        if _n_ = 1 then call symput('review_count',\n                                     strip(put(_nrev, best.)));\n        stop;\n    run;\n\n    data _null_;\n        set &pass_ds nobs=_npass;\n        if _n_ = 1 then call symput('pass_count',\n                                     strip(put(_npass, best.)));\n        stop;\n    run;\n\n    %let total_alerts = %eval(&block_count + &review_count);\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- Alert Generation Summary ----;\n    %put NOTE: BLOCK  transactions: &block_count;\n    %put NOTE: REVIEW transactions: &review_count;\n    %put NOTE: PASS   transactions: &pass_count;\n    %put NOTE: Total alerts generated: &total_alerts;\n\n%mend alert_generation;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 6: Main Program Execution                                         */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%put NOTE: ===== Fraud Detection Pipeline Started =====;\n%put NOTE: Run ID:       &run_id;\n%put NOTE: Process Date: &process_date;\n\n/* --- Step 1: Run feature engineering --- */\n%feature_engineering(\n    input_ds   = txn.transactions,\n    output_ds  = work.txn_featured,\n    history_ds = txn.transaction_history\n);\n\n/* Error check after feature engineering */\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let fraud_rc = 1;\n    %put ERROR: Feature engineering failed with syserr=&syserr;\n    %goto fraud_exit;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 2: Run rule engine --- */\n%rule_engine(\n    input_ds  = work.txn_featured,\n    output_ds = work.txn_ruled\n);\n\n/* Error check after rule engine */\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let fraud_rc = 2;\n    %put ERROR: Rule engine failed with syserr=&syserr;\n    %goto fraud_exit;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 3: Score transactions with logistic regression model --- */\n%score_model(\n    input_ds  = work.txn_ruled,\n    output_ds = work.txn_scored,\n    coeff_ds  = mdl.model_coefficients\n);\n\n/* Error check after model scoring */\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let fraud_rc = 3;\n    %put ERROR: Model scoring failed with syserr=&syserr;\n    %goto fraud_exit;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 4: Generate alerts and route to queues --- */\n%alert_generation(\n    input_ds         = work.txn_scored,\n    block_ds         = alert.blocked_transactions,\n    review_ds        = alert.review_queue,\n    pass_ds          = work.passed_transactions,\n    alert_ds         = alert.fraud_alerts,\n    block_threshold  = 750,\n    review_threshold = 400\n);\n\n/* Error check after alert generation */\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let fraud_rc = 4;\n    %put ERROR: Alert generation failed with syserr=&syserr;\n    %goto fraud_exit;\n%end;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 7: Daily Fraud Metrics Dashboard                                  */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* Generate daily summary metrics aggregated by transaction date */\nproc sql;\n    create table alert.daily_fraud_metrics as\n    select\n        datepart(transaction_datetime)\n            as txn_date format=date9.,\n        count(*)\n            as total_transactions,\n        sum(case when alert_action = 'BLOCK'  then 1 else 0 end)\n            as blocked_count,\n        sum(case when alert_action = 'REVIEW' then 1 else 0 end)\n            as review_count,\n        sum(case when alert_action = 'PASS'   then 1 else 0 end)\n            as passed_count,\n        sum(case when rule_count > 0 then 1 else 0 end)\n            as rule_hit_count,\n        avg(blended_score)\n            as avg_fraud_score format=8.2,\n        max(blended_score)\n            as max_fraud_score,\n        sum(transaction_amount)\n            as total_amount format=dollar20.2,\n        sum(case when alert_action = 'BLOCK'\n            then transaction_amount else 0 end)\n            as blocked_amount format=dollar20.2,\n        calculated blocked_count\n            / calculated total_transactions * 100\n            as block_rate format=8.4,\n        calculated rule_hit_count\n            / calculated total_transactions * 100\n            as rule_hit_rate format=8.4\n    from work.txn_scored\n    group by calculated txn_date\n    order by calculated txn_date;\nquit;\n\n/* Rule effectiveness analysis: hits and true blocks per rule */\nproc sql;\n    create table work.rule_effectiveness as\n    select 'Rule_01_High_Value'       as rule_name length=30,\n           sum(rule_hit_1)            as hits,\n           sum(rule_hit_1 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK')) as true_blocks\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_02_Rapid_Velocity',\n           sum(rule_hit_2),\n           sum(rule_hit_2 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_03_Amount_Deviation',\n           sum(rule_hit_3),\n           sum(rule_hit_3 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_04_Off_Hours',\n           sum(rule_hit_4),\n           sum(rule_hit_4 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_05_New_Account',\n           sum(rule_hit_5),\n           sum(rule_hit_5 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_06_Merchant_Repeat',\n           sum(rule_hit_6),\n           sum(rule_hit_6 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_07_Cross_Border',\n           sum(rule_hit_7),\n           sum(rule_hit_7 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_08_Round_Amount',\n           sum(rule_hit_8),\n           sum(rule_hit_8 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_09_BSA_Threshold',\n           sum(rule_hit_9),\n           sum(rule_hit_9 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_10_Spend_Anomaly',\n           sum(rule_hit_10),\n           sum(rule_hit_10 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_11_72h_Velocity',\n           sum(rule_hit_11),\n           sum(rule_hit_11 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_12_HighRisk_Cust',\n           sum(rule_hit_12),\n           sum(rule_hit_12 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored;\nquit;\n\n/* Score distribution report */\nproc means data=work.txn_scored\n           n mean std min p25 median p75 p90 p95 p99 max;\n    var blended_score model_score rule_score\n        transaction_amount fraud_probability;\n    title 'Fraud Detection - Score Distribution Summary';\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 8: Error Handling and Completion                                   */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%fraud_exit:\n\n%if &fraud_rc ne 0 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: ==================================================;\n    %put ERROR: Fraud Detection Pipeline FAILED;\n    %put ERROR: Return Code: &fraud_rc;\n    %put ERROR: Run ID:      &run_id;\n    %put ERROR: ==================================================;\n\n    /* Write error log record to alert library */\n    data alert.pipeline_errors;\n        length run_id $40 error_step $30 error_code 8\n               error_message $200;\n        run_id        = "&run_id";\n        error_step    = "STEP_&fraud_rc";\n        error_code    = &fraud_rc;\n        error_message = "Pipeline failed at step &fraud_rc - syserr=&syserr";\n        error_datetime = datetime();\n        format error_datetime datetime20.;\n    run;\n%end;\n\n%else %do;\n    %put NOTE: ==================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Fraud Detection Pipeline COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY;\n    %put NOTE: Run ID:        &run_id;\n    %put NOTE: Process Date:  &process_date;\n    %put NOTE: Blocked:       &block_count transactions;\n    %put NOTE: Review:        &review_count transactions;\n    %put NOTE: Passed:        &pass_count transactions;\n    %put NOTE: Total Alerts:  &total_alerts;\n    %put NOTE: ==================================================;\n\n    /* Write completion flag file for downstream batch scheduler */\n    data _null_;\n        file '/fraud/output/alerts/completion_flag.txt';\n        put "RUN_ID=&run_id";\n        put "STATUS=SUCCESS";\n        put "PROCESS_DATE=&process_date";\n        put "BLOCK_COUNT=&block_count";\n        put "REVIEW_COUNT=&review_count";\n        put "PASS_COUNT=&pass_count";\n        put "COMPLETION_TIME=" datetime() datetime20.;\n    run;\n%end;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 9: Cleanup                                                        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* Delete intermediate work datasets */\nproc datasets lib=work nolist;\n    delete _txn_sorted _hist_sorted _txn_combined\n           txn_featured txn_ruled txn_scored\n           passed_transactions rule_effectiveness;\nquit;\n\n/* Reset OPTIONS to defaults */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n\n%put NOTE: ===== Fraud Detection Pipeline Ended =====;\n%put NOTE: Timestamp: %sysfunc(datetime(), datetime20.);\n-gold_meta19]
[FAIL] test_no_lineage_violations_in_deterministic[gsh_06_regulatory_report.sas-/******************************************************************************\n * Program Name : gsh_06_regulatory_report.sas\n * Author       : Capital Markets Risk & Compliance Division\n * Department   : Regulatory Reporting \u2014 Prudential Analytics\n * Version      : 3.1\n * Created      : 2025-01-15\n * Modified     : 2026-02-19\n * Purpose      : Multi-section regulatory filing report generator for\n *                CCAR (Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review) and\n *                Basel III capital adequacy submissions. Computes\n *                risk-weighted assets (RWA) under Standardized and IRB\n *                approaches, derives CET1/Tier1/Total capital ratios,\n *                runs multi-quarter stress testing projections, and\n *                generates regulatory filing schedules (HC-R, FR Y-14).\n * Input        : risk.exposures, risk.pd_lgd_models, risk.collateral,\n *                fin.capital_components, fin.balance_sheet,\n *                comp.regulatory_limits, comp.buffer_requirements\n * Output       : out.rwa_summary, out.capital_ratios, out.stress_results,\n *                out.schedule_*, out.filing_cover_page\n * Dependencies : regulatory_formats.sas (format library for filing codes)\n * Reg Refs     : Basel III CRR Art. 92, CCAR FR Y-14A, Dodd-Frank \xa7165\n * Filing Period: Quarterly (current quarter derived from process date)\n * Change Log   :\n *   2025-01-15  v1.0  Initial RWA calculation framework         (A. Chen)\n *   2025-04-01  v1.5  Added IRB approach with PD/LGD/EAD       (R. Patel)\n *   2025-06-20  v2.0  Capital ratios and buffer calculations    (A. Chen)\n *   2025-09-10  v2.5  Stress testing module (3 scenarios)       (J. Novak)\n *   2025-11-28  v3.0  Schedule generation and ODS output        (R. Patel)\n *   2026-02-19  v3.1  Error handling, cover page, validation    (A. Chen)\n ******************************************************************************/\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 1: Environment Setup and Library Definitions                      */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\noptions mprint symbolgen mlogic nocenter ls=160 ps=60\n        validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i;\n\n/* --- Risk data library: exposures, PD/LGD models, collateral --- */\nlibname risk '/regulatory/data/risk'\n             access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Finance library: capital components and balance sheet --- */\nlibname fin '/regulatory/data/finance'\n            access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Compliance library: regulatory limits and buffer requirements --- */\nlibname comp '/regulatory/data/compliance'\n             access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Output library: filing schedules and summary reports --- */\nlibname out '/regulatory/output/filing';\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 2: Global Parameters and Reporting Period                         */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* --- Reporting period parameters --- */\n%let report_date    = %sysfunc(today(), date9.);\n%let report_qtr     = %sysfunc(today(), yyq6.);\n%let filing_year    = %sysfunc(year(%sysfunc(today())));\n%let filing_quarter = %sysfunc(qtr(%sysfunc(today())));\n%let run_id         = REG_%sysfunc(today(), yymmddn8.)_%sysfunc(time(), time5.);\n%let reg_rc         = 0;\n\n/* --- Regulatory minimum thresholds (Basel III) --- */\n%let min_cet1_ratio  = 0.045;\n%let min_tier1_ratio = 0.060;\n%let min_total_ratio = 0.080;\n%let ccb_rate        = 0.025;\n%let gsib_rate       = 0.010;\n\n/* --- Stress testing parameters --- */\n%let n_quarters      = 9;\n%let base_loss_rate  = 0.005;\n%let adv_loss_rate   = 0.025;\n%let sev_loss_rate   = 0.055;\n\n/* --- Schedule identifiers for filing --- */\n%let n_schedules     = 6;\n%let sched_id_1      = HC-R_PART1;\n%let sched_id_2      = HC-R_PART2;\n%let sched_id_3      = FR_Y14A_SUMM;\n%let sched_id_4      = FR_Y14A_LOSS;\n%let sched_id_5      = FR_Y14A_PPNR;\n%let sched_id_6      = FR_Y14Q_SUPP;\n\n/* Load regulatory format library for filing codes */\n%include '/regulatory/macros/regulatory_formats.sas';\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 3: %MACRO calc_rwa \u2014 Risk-Weighted Assets Calculation             */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO calc_rwa\n  Purpose: Calculate risk-weighted assets for a given asset class using\n           either the Standardized approach (fixed regulatory risk\n           weights) or the Internal Ratings-Based (IRB) approach with\n           PD/LGD/EAD model outputs. Aggregates exposure-level RWA\n           into portfolio-level summaries.\n  Parameters:\n    asset_class= : Asset class identifier (CORPORATE, SOVEREIGN,\n                   RETAIL, EQUITY)\n    approach=    : Calculation approach (STANDARDIZED or IRB)\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro calc_rwa(asset_class=, approach=);\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- calc_rwa: asset_class=&asset_class approach=&approach ----;\n\n    /* ----- Standardized Approach: Fixed Risk Weights ----- */\n    %if &approach = STANDARDIZED %then %do;\n\n        /* Apply Basel III standardized risk weights by rating band */\n        data work.rwa_&asset_class._std;\n            set risk.exposures(where=(asset_class = "&asset_class"));\n\n            /* Assign risk weight based on external credit rating */\n            select (rating_band);\n                when ('AAA','AA')  risk_weight = 0.20;\n                when ('A')         risk_weight = 0.50;\n                when ('BBB')       risk_weight = 1.00;\n                when ('BB')        risk_weight = 1.00;\n                when ('B')         risk_weight = 1.50;\n                when ('CCC','D')   risk_weight = 1.50;\n                otherwise          risk_weight = 1.00;  /* unrated */\n            end;\n\n            /* Sovereign exposures get preferential treatment */\n            if "&asset_class" = "SOVEREIGN" and domestic_flag = 'Y' then\n                risk_weight = 0.00;\n\n            /* Apply credit risk mitigation (CRM) adjustments */\n            if collateral_value > 0 then do;\n                crm_factor = min(collateral_value / exposure_amount, 1.0);\n                adjusted_exposure = exposure_amount * (1 - crm_factor * 0.80);\n            end;\n            else do;\n                crm_factor = 0;\n                adjusted_exposure = exposure_amount;\n            end;\n\n            /* Calculate risk-weighted asset amount */\n            rwa_amount       = adjusted_exposure * risk_weight;\n            calculation_date = "&report_date"d;\n            calc_approach    = 'STANDARDIZED';\n            calc_asset_class = "&asset_class";\n        run;\n\n    %end;\n\n    /* ----- IRB Approach: PD/LGD/EAD Model-Based ----- */\n    %else %do;\n\n        /* Retrieve PD/LGD/EAD model parameters for this asset class */\n        data work.rwa_&asset_class._irb;\n            merge risk.exposures(where=(asset_class = "&asset_class")\n                                 in=a)\n                  risk.pd_lgd_models(where=(model_asset_class = "&asset_class")\n                                     in=b);\n            by counterparty_id;\n            if a;\n\n            /* Default probability of default if model missing */\n            if pd_estimate = . then pd_estimate = 0.03;\n            if lgd_estimate = . then lgd_estimate = 0.45;\n\n            /* Effective maturity adjustment (Basel formula) */\n            maturity_adj = (1 + (effective_maturity - 2.5) * 0.05);\n            if maturity_adj < 0.70 then maturity_adj = 0.70;\n            if maturity_adj > 1.50 then maturity_adj = 1.50;\n\n            /* Asset correlation factor (R) per Basel III */\n            r_factor = 0.12 * (1 - exp(-50 * pd_estimate)) /\n                       (1 - exp(-50))\n                     + 0.24 * (1 - (1 - exp(-50 * pd_estimate)) /\n                       (1 - exp(-50)));\n\n            /* Capital requirement (K) \u2014 Basel IRB formula */\n            /* K = LGD * [N((1-R)^(-0.5) * G(PD) + (R/(1-R))^0.5 * G(0.999)) - PD] * MA */\n            /* Simplified computation using approximation */\n            norm_pd        = probit(pd_estimate);\n            norm_999       = probit(0.999);\n            adjusted_norm  = (norm_pd + sqrt(r_factor) * norm_999) /\n                             sqrt(1 - r_factor);\n            capital_req    = lgd_estimate *\n                             (probnorm(adjusted_norm) - pd_estimate) *\n                             maturity_adj;\n            if capital_req < 0 then capital_req = 0;\n\n            /* EAD calculation with credit conversion factors */\n            if ead_estimate > 0 then\n                effective_ead = ead_estimate;\n            else\n                effective_ead = exposure_amount * 1.0;  /* on-balance-sheet CCF */\n\n            /* Risk-weighted asset = 12.5 * K * EAD */\n            rwa_amount       = 12.5 * capital_req * effective_ead;\n            calculation_date = "&report_date"d;\n            calc_approach    = 'IRB';\n            calc_asset_class = "&asset_class";\n        run;\n\n    %end;\n\n    /* ----- Common: Portfolio-level RWA aggregation ----- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        create table work.rwa_&asset_class._summary as\n        select\n            calc_asset_class as asset_class,\n            calc_approach    as approach,\n            count(*)                       as n_exposures,\n            sum(exposure_amount)           as total_exposure\n                format=comma20.2,\n            sum(rwa_amount)                as total_rwa\n                format=comma20.2,\n            mean(rwa_amount/exposure_amount) as avg_risk_weight\n                format=percent8.2,\n            calculation_date\n        from work.rwa_&asset_class._&substr(&approach, 1, 3)\n        group by calc_asset_class, calc_approach, calculation_date;\n\n        /* Capture total RWA for this asset class into macro variable */\n        select sum(rwa_amount) into :rwa_&asset_class._total trimmed\n        from work.rwa_&asset_class._&substr(&approach, 1, 3);\n    quit;\n\n    %put NOTE: RWA for &asset_class (&approach) = &&rwa_&asset_class._total;\n\n%mend calc_rwa;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 4: %MACRO capital_ratios \u2014 Capital Adequacy Ratios                */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO capital_ratios\n  Purpose: Compute CET1, Tier 1, and Total Capital ratios against\n           total risk-weighted assets. Compare to regulatory minimums\n           and calculate capital conservation buffer (CCB) and G-SIB\n           surcharge. Flags breaches against regulatory thresholds.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro capital_ratios;\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- capital_ratios: Computing regulatory capital ratios ----;\n\n    /* Step 1: Aggregate capital components from finance library */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        /* CET1 Capital = Common equity - regulatory deductions */\n        select sum(case when component_type = 'CET1_POSITIVE' then amount\n                        when component_type = 'CET1_DEDUCTION' then -amount\n                        else 0 end)\n            into :cet1_capital trimmed\n        from fin.capital_components\n        where reporting_date = "&report_date"d;\n\n        /* Additional Tier 1 Capital */\n        select sum(case when component_type = 'AT1_INSTRUMENT' then amount\n                        when component_type = 'AT1_DEDUCTION' then -amount\n                        else 0 end)\n            into :at1_capital trimmed\n        from fin.capital_components\n        where reporting_date = "&report_date"d;\n\n        /* Tier 2 Capital */\n        select sum(case when component_type = 'T2_INSTRUMENT' then amount\n                        when component_type = 'T2_DEDUCTION' then -amount\n                        else 0 end)\n            into :t2_capital trimmed\n        from fin.capital_components\n        where reporting_date = "&report_date"d;\n\n        /* Total RWA across all asset classes */\n        select sum(total_rwa) into :total_rwa trimmed\n        from (select total_rwa from work.rwa_corporate_summary\n              union all\n              select total_rwa from work.rwa_sovereign_summary\n              union all\n              select total_rwa from work.rwa_retail_summary\n              union all\n              select total_rwa from work.rwa_equity_summary);\n    quit;\n\n    /* Step 2: Compute ratios and compare to minimums */\n    data out.capital_ratios;\n        length ratio_name $30 ratio_value 8 regulatory_min 8\n               buffer_amount 8 surplus_deficit 8 breach_flag $1;\n\n        /* Derived capital levels */\n        cet1_cap    = &cet1_capital;\n        tier1_cap   = &cet1_capital + &at1_capital;\n        total_cap   = &cet1_capital + &at1_capital + &t2_capital;\n        total_rwa   = &total_rwa;\n        report_date = "&report_date"d;\n        format report_date date9.;\n\n        /* --- CET1 Ratio --- */\n        ratio_name     = 'CET1 Capital Ratio';\n        ratio_value    = cet1_cap / total_rwa;\n        regulatory_min = &min_cet1_ratio;\n        surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n        breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n        buffer_amount  = 0;\n        output;\n\n        /* --- Tier 1 Ratio --- */\n        ratio_name     = 'Tier 1 Capital Ratio';\n        ratio_value    = tier1_cap / total_rwa;\n        regulatory_min = &min_tier1_ratio;\n        surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n        breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n        buffer_amount  = 0;\n        output;\n\n        /* --- Total Capital Ratio --- */\n        ratio_name     = 'Total Capital Ratio';\n        ratio_value    = total_cap / total_rwa;\n        regulatory_min = &min_total_ratio;\n        surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n        breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n        buffer_amount  = 0;\n        output;\n\n        /* --- Capital Conservation Buffer (CCB) --- */\n        %if &ccb_rate > 0 %then %do;\n            ratio_name     = 'CET1 + CCB Ratio';\n            ratio_value    = cet1_cap / total_rwa;\n            regulatory_min = &min_cet1_ratio + &ccb_rate;\n            surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n            breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n            buffer_amount  = &ccb_rate * total_rwa;\n            output;\n        %end;\n\n        /* --- G-SIB Surcharge --- */\n        %if &gsib_rate > 0 %then %do;\n            ratio_name     = 'CET1 + CCB + G-SIB';\n            ratio_value    = cet1_cap / total_rwa;\n            regulatory_min = &min_cet1_ratio + &ccb_rate + &gsib_rate;\n            surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n            breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n            buffer_amount  = (&ccb_rate + &gsib_rate) * total_rwa;\n            output;\n        %end;\n\n        drop cet1_cap tier1_cap total_cap total_rwa;\n    run;\n\n    /* Store key ratios as macro variables for downstream use */\n    data _null_;\n        set out.capital_ratios;\n        if ratio_name = 'CET1 Capital Ratio' then\n            call symputx('cet1_ratio', put(ratio_value, 8.4));\n        if ratio_name = 'Tier 1 Capital Ratio' then\n            call symputx('tier1_ratio', put(ratio_value, 8.4));\n        if ratio_name = 'Total Capital Ratio' then\n            call symputx('total_ratio', put(ratio_value, 8.4));\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: CET1 Ratio  = &cet1_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Tier1 Ratio  = &tier1_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Total Ratio  = &total_ratio;\n\n%mend capital_ratios;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 5: %MACRO stress_testing \u2014 Stress Scenario Analysis               */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO stress_testing\n  Purpose: Project losses and capital impacts over 9 quarters under\n           a given macroeconomic stress scenario. Uses arrays for\n           multi-period loss projection, scenario-specific loss rates,\n           and PROC MEANS for summary statistics.\n  Parameters:\n    scenario= : Stress scenario name (BASE, ADVERSE, SEVERELY_ADVERSE)\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro stress_testing(scenario=);\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- stress_testing: scenario=&scenario ----;\n\n    /* Determine scenario-specific loss rate multiplier */\n    %if &scenario = BASE %then %do;\n        %let loss_rate = &base_loss_rate;\n        %let gdp_shock = -0.005;\n        %let unemp_delta = 0.002;\n    %end;\n    %else %if &scenario = ADVERSE %then %do;\n        %let loss_rate = &adv_loss_rate;\n        %let gdp_shock = -0.035;\n        %let unemp_delta = 0.025;\n    %end;\n    %else %if &scenario = SEVERELY_ADVERSE %then %do;\n        %let loss_rate = &sev_loss_rate;\n        %let gdp_shock = -0.080;\n        %let unemp_delta = 0.060;\n    %end;\n\n    /* Multi-quarter loss projection using arrays */\n    data work.stress_&scenario;\n        set work.rwa_corporate_summary(keep=total_exposure total_rwa)\n            work.rwa_retail_summary(keep=total_exposure total_rwa);\n\n        /* Quarter projection arrays */\n        array qtr_loss{&n_quarters}    qtr_loss_1 - qtr_loss_&n_quarters;\n        array qtr_capital{&n_quarters} qtr_cap_1  - qtr_cap_&n_quarters;\n        array qtr_rwa{&n_quarters}     qtr_rwa_1  - qtr_rwa_&n_quarters;\n        array cum_loss{&n_quarters}    cum_loss_1 - cum_loss_&n_quarters;\n\n        /* Scenario parameters */\n        scenario_name = "&scenario";\n        base_capital  = &cet1_capital;\n        annual_rate   = &loss_rate;\n\n        /* Project losses over each quarter with increasing severity */\n        %do q = 1 %to &n_quarters;\n            /* Loss rate increases in early quarters, stabilizes later */\n            %let q_weight = %sysevalf(&q / &n_quarters);\n            qtr_loss{&q} = total_exposure * annual_rate *\n                           (0.5 + &q_weight * 0.5) / 4;\n            if &q = 1 then\n                cum_loss{&q} = qtr_loss{&q};\n            else\n                cum_loss{&q} = cum_loss{%eval(&q - 1)} + qtr_loss{&q};\n\n            /* Capital after losses (simplified \u2014 no earnings offset) */\n            qtr_capital{&q} = base_capital - cum_loss{&q};\n\n            /* RWA migration under stress (assets deteriorate) */\n            qtr_rwa{&q} = total_rwa * (1 + &q_weight * 0.15);\n        %end;\n\n        /* Minimum capital ratio across projection horizon */\n        min_capital = min(of qtr_cap_1 - qtr_cap_&n_quarters);\n        min_ratio   = min_capital / max(of qtr_rwa_1 - qtr_rwa_&n_quarters);\n        gdp_impact  = &gdp_shock;\n        unemp_impact = &unemp_delta;\n\n        format total_exposure total_rwa base_capital min_capital\n               qtr_loss_1-qtr_loss_&n_quarters\n               qtr_cap_1-qtr_cap_&n_quarters\n               cum_loss_1-cum_loss_&n_quarters\n               comma20.2;\n        format min_ratio percent8.2;\n    run;\n\n    /* Summary statistics for the stress scenario */\n    proc means data=work.stress_&scenario\n               n mean std min max sum maxdec=2;\n        var qtr_loss_1-qtr_loss_&n_quarters\n            qtr_cap_1-qtr_cap_&n_quarters\n            cum_loss_1-cum_loss_&n_quarters;\n        title "Stress Testing \u2014 &scenario Scenario: Quarterly Projections";\n        title2 "Filing Period: &report_qtr | Run ID: &run_id";\n    run;\n    title;\n\n    /* Append scenario results to consolidated output */\n    proc append base=out.stress_results\n                data=work.stress_&scenario force;\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: Stress testing complete for &scenario scenario.;\n    %put NOTE: Minimum projected CET1 ratio = %sysfunc(putn(\n               %sysevalf(&cet1_capital * 0.85), comma20.2));\n\n%mend stress_testing;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 6: %MACRO generate_schedules \u2014 Regulatory Filing Schedules        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO generate_schedules\n  Purpose: Generate individual regulatory filing schedules for the\n           current reporting period. Iterates over schedule IDs,\n           applies schedule-specific formatting and data aggregation\n           rules, and produces ODS output for each schedule.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro generate_schedules;\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- generate_schedules: Creating &n_schedules schedules ----;\n\n    /* Loop through each schedule identifier */\n    %do s = 1 %to &n_schedules;\n\n        %let current_sched = &&sched_id_&s;\n        %put NOTE: Processing schedule &s of &n_schedules: &current_sched;\n\n        /* Schedule-specific data aggregation */\n        %if &current_sched = HC-R_PART1 %then %do;\n            /* HC-R Part 1: Regulatory Capital Components */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_hcr_p1 as\n                select\n                    component_type,\n                    component_name,\n                    sum(amount) as reported_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period,\n                    "&report_date"d as as_of_date format=date9.\n                from fin.capital_components\n                where reporting_date = "&report_date"d\n                group by component_type, component_name\n                order by component_type, component_name;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = HC-R_PART2 %then %do;\n            /* HC-R Part 2: Risk-Weighted Assets by Category */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_hcr_p2 as\n                select\n                    asset_class,\n                    approach,\n                    n_exposures,\n                    total_exposure format=comma20.2,\n                    total_rwa      format=comma20.2,\n                    avg_risk_weight format=percent8.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period,\n                    "&report_date"d as as_of_date format=date9.\n                from (select * from work.rwa_corporate_summary\n                      union all\n                      select * from work.rwa_sovereign_summary\n                      union all\n                      select * from work.rwa_retail_summary\n                      union all\n                      select * from work.rwa_equity_summary)\n                order by asset_class;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14A_SUMM %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14A Summary: Capital ratios and buffers */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14a_summ as\n                select\n                    ratio_name,\n                    ratio_value    format=percent8.4,\n                    regulatory_min format=percent8.4,\n                    surplus_deficit format=percent8.4,\n                    breach_flag,\n                    buffer_amount  format=comma20.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period\n                from out.capital_ratios\n                order by ratio_name;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14A_LOSS %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14A Loss Projections: Stress test loss outputs */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14a_loss as\n                select\n                    scenario_name,\n                    sum(qtr_loss_1) as q1_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(qtr_loss_2) as q2_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(qtr_loss_3) as q3_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(cum_loss_9) as total_cum_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    min(min_ratio)  as worst_ratio format=percent8.4,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period\n                from out.stress_results\n                group by scenario_name\n                order by scenario_name;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14A_PPNR %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14A PPNR: Pre-Provision Net Revenue projections */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14a_ppnr as\n                select\n                    line_item,\n                    sum(case when quarter = 1 then amount else 0 end)\n                        as q1_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(case when quarter = 2 then amount else 0 end)\n                        as q2_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(case when quarter = 3 then amount else 0 end)\n                        as q3_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(amount) as total_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period\n                from fin.balance_sheet\n                where fiscal_year = &filing_year\n                  and line_category = 'PPNR'\n                group by line_item\n                order by line_item;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14Q_SUPP %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14Q Supplemental: Detailed exposure data */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14q_supp as\n                select\n                    e.asset_class,\n                    e.counterparty_id,\n                    e.exposure_amount  format=comma20.2,\n                    e.rating_band,\n                    m.pd_estimate      format=8.6,\n                    m.lgd_estimate     format=8.4,\n                    c.collateral_value format=comma20.2,\n                    c.collateral_type,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period,\n                    "&report_date"d as as_of_date format=date9.\n                from risk.exposures e\n                left join risk.pd_lgd_models m\n                    on e.counterparty_id = m.counterparty_id\n                   and e.asset_class = m.model_asset_class\n                left join risk.collateral c\n                    on e.counterparty_id = c.counterparty_id\n                order by e.asset_class, e.counterparty_id;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        /* ODS output for each schedule */\n        ods pdf file="/regulatory/output/filing/&current_sched._&filing_year.Q&filing_quarter..pdf";\n        proc print data=out.schedule_%sysfunc(translate(&current_sched, '_', '-'))\n                   noobs label;\n            title "Regulatory Filing Schedule: &current_sched";\n            title2 "Reporting Period: &report_qtr | As of &report_date";\n            title3 "Institution: Sample Bank, N.A. | RSSD ID: 1234567";\n        run;\n        ods pdf close;\n\n        %put NOTE: Schedule &current_sched generated successfully.;\n\n    %end;\n\n    title;\n    %put NOTE: All &n_schedules regulatory schedules generated.;\n\n%mend generate_schedules;\n\n/*
