Nguyen)\n *   2025-12-15  v2.0  Added feature engineering framework        (M. Torres)\n *   2026-01-10  v2.5  Platt scaling, KS/Gini diagnostics        (R. Nguyen)\n *   2026-02-19  v3.1  Multi-method training, lift chart outputs  (J. Kim)\n ******************************************************************************/\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 1: Environment Setup \u2014 Libraries, Options, Model Parameters       */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\noptions mprint mlogic symbolgen nocenter ls=200 ps=65\n        validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i;\n\n/* --- Library references for analytics pipeline layers --- */\nlibname raw      '/analytics/data/raw'         access=readonly;\nlibname features '/analytics/data/features';\nlibname mdllib   '/analytics/models/repository';\nlibname output   '/analytics/output/deliverables';\n\n/* --- Model configuration parameters --- */\n%let model_version   = v3.1;\n%let model_target    = churn_flag;\n%let analysis_date   = %sysfunc(today(), yymmdd10.);\n%let lookback_months = 12;\n%let score_threshold = 0.5;\n%let n_deciles       = 10;\n%let min_obs         = 100;\n%let train_pct       = 70;\n%let valid_pct       = 30;\n%let random_seed     = 20260219;\n%let pipeline_rc     = 0;\n%let step_count      = 0;\n\n/* --- Feature window specifications --- */\n%let window_1m  = 30;\n%let window_3m  = 90;\n%let window_6m  = 180;\n%let window_12m = 365;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 2: Macro Definitions \u2014 Pipeline Components                        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* MACRO: extract_population                                          */\n/* Purpose: Define the analysis population of active customers with   */\n/*          sufficient history for churn modeling.                     */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro extract_population(as_of_date=);\n    %local n_active n_eligible;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Extracting analysis population as of &as_of_date;\n    %put NOTE: Lookback window: &lookback_months months;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n\n    /* Identify active customers with activity in the observation window */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        create table work.active_customers as\n        select  c.customer_id,\n                c.enrollment_date,\n                c.segment_code,\n                c.region,\n                c.product_tier,\n                c.tenure_months,\n                max(t.transaction_date) as last_activity_date format=yymmdd10.,\n                count(distinct t.transaction_id) as txn_count,\n                sum(t.amount) as total_spend format=comma12.2\n        from    raw.customers c\n        inner join raw.transactions t\n            on  c.customer_id = t.customer_id\n        where   t.transaction_date >= intnx('month', "&as_of_date"d, -&lookback_months, 'B')\n            and c.status = 'ACTIVE'\n            and c.enrollment_date < intnx('month', "&as_of_date"d, -3, 'B')\n        group by c.customer_id, c.enrollment_date, c.segment_code,\n                 c.region, c.product_tier, c.tenure_months\n        having  count(distinct t.transaction_id) >= 2;\n\n        select count(*) into :n_active trimmed\n        from work.active_customers;\n    quit;\n    %put NOTE: Active customers identified: &n_active;\n\n    /* Apply population filters and assign cohort labels */\n    data work.population (keep=customer_id enrollment_date segment_code region\n                               product_tier tenure_months last_activity_date\n                               txn_count total_spend cohort age_band);\n        set work.active_customers;\n\n        /* Tenure-based cohort assignment */\n        length cohort $15 age_band $10;\n        if tenure_months < 6 then cohort = 'NEW';\n        else if tenure_months < 24 then cohort = 'ESTABLISHED';\n        else if tenure_months < 60 then cohort = 'MATURE';\n        else cohort = 'LEGACY';\n\n        /* Age band derivation from enrollment */\n        _years = intck('year', enrollment_date, "&as_of_date"d);\n        if _years < 25 then age_band = '18-24';\n        else if _years < 35 then age_band = '25-34';\n        else if _years < 45 then age_band = '35-44';\n        else if _years < 55 then age_band = '45-54';\n        else age_band = '55+';\n\n        /* Exclude outliers */\n        if total_spend > 0 and txn_count <= 5000;\n    run;\n\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :n_eligible trimmed\n        from work.population;\n    quit;\n    %put NOTE: Eligible population after filtering: &n_eligible;\n\n    %if &n_eligible < &min_obs %then %do;\n        %put ERROR: Population too small (&n_eligible < &min_obs). Aborting.;\n        %let pipeline_rc = 1;\n    %end;\n%mend extract_population;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* MACRO: build_features                                              */\n/* Purpose: Engineer features by domain group. Supports DEMOGRAPHIC,  */\n/*          BEHAVIORAL, FINANCIAL, and ENGAGEMENT feature sets.       */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro build_features(feature_group=);\n    %local i n_windows;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Building features \u2014 group: &feature_group;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n\n    /* ---- DEMOGRAPHIC features ---- */\n    %if &feature_group = DEMOGRAPHIC %then %do;\n        data work.feat_demographic (keep=customer_id age_bin tenure_band\n                                         geo_region urban_flag hh_size_cat);\n            set work.population;\n            length age_bin $12 tenure_band $15 geo_region $20;\n\n            /* Age binning */\n            if age_band in ('18-24') then age_bin = 'YOUNG';\n            else if age_band in ('25-34', '35-44') then age_bin = 'MIDDLE';\n            else age_bin = 'SENIOR';\n\n            /* Tenure banding */\n            if tenure_months < 12 then tenure_band = 'UNDER_1YR';\n            else if tenure_months < 36 then tenure_band = '1_TO_3YR';\n            else if tenure_months < 72 then tenure_band = '3_TO_6YR';\n            else tenure_band = 'OVER_6YR';\n\n            /* Geographic region consolidation */\n            select (region);\n                when ('NE', 'MA') geo_region = 'NORTHEAST';\n                when ('SE', 'FL') geo_region = 'SOUTHEAST';\n                when ('MW', 'GL') geo_region = 'MIDWEST';\n                when ('SW', 'TX') geo_region = 'SOUTHWEST';\n                when ('WE', 'CA') geo_region = 'WEST';\n                otherwise geo_region = 'OTHER';\n            end;\n\n            /* Urban flag and household size proxy */\n            urban_flag = (region in ('MA', 'FL', 'TX', 'CA'));\n            hh_size_cat = ceil(ranuni(&random_seed) * 4);\n        run;\n    %end;\n\n    /* ---- BEHAVIORAL features with RETAIN and LAG ---- */\n    %else %if &feature_group = BEHAVIORAL %then %do;\n        proc sort data=raw.transactions out=work._txn_sorted;\n            by customer_id transaction_date;\n        run;\n\n        data work.feat_behavioral (keep=customer_id avg_days_between\n                recency_days frequency_score intensity_trend\n                peak_month session_regularity channel_diversity);\n            set work._txn_sorted;\n            by customer_id;\n\n            retain cum_gap_days cum_txn_count prev_amount cum_channels 0;\n            length channel_diversity 8;\n\n            lag_date = lag(transaction_date);\n            lag_amount = lag(amount);\n\n            if first.customer_id then do;\n                cum_gap_days = 0;\n                cum_txn_count = 0;\n                prev_amount = 0;\n                cum_channels = 0;\n            end;\n            else do;\n                if lag_date > . then\n                    cum_gap_days + (transaction_date - lag_date);\n                cum_txn_count + 1;\n            end;\n\n            prev_amount = coalesce(lag_amount, 0);\n\n            /* Track channel usage via bitmask */\n            if channel = 'WEB' then cum_channels = bor(cum_channels, 1);\n            else if channel = 'MOBILE' then cum_channels = bor(cum_channels, 2);\n            else if channel = 'STORE' then cum_channels = bor(cum_channels, 4);\n            else if channel = 'PHONE' then cum_channels = bor(cum_channels, 8);\n\n            if last.customer_id then do;\n                avg_days_between = ifn(cum_txn_count > 0,\n                                       cum_gap_days / cum_txn_count, .);\n                recency_days = intck('day', transaction_date, "&analysis_date"d);\n                frequency_score = log(max(cum_txn_count, 1));\n                intensity_trend = ifn(prev_amount > 0,\n                                      (amount - prev_amount) / prev_amount, 0);\n                peak_month = month(transaction_date);\n                session_regularity = ifn(cum_gap_days > 0,\n                    std(cum_gap_days / max(cum_txn_count, 1)), 0);\n                channel_diversity = 0;\n                if band(cum_channels, 1) then channel_diversity + 1;\n                if band(cum_channels, 2) then channel_diversity + 1;\n                if band(cum_channels, 4) then channel_diversity + 1;\n                if band(cum_channels, 8) then channel_diversity + 1;\n                output;\n            end;\n        run;\n    %end;\n\n    /* ---- FINANCIAL features via PROC SQL ---- */\n    %else %if &feature_group = FINANCIAL %then %do;\n        proc sql;\n            create table work.feat_financial as\n            select  p.customer_id,\n                    /* Revenue metrics */\n                    sum(t.amount) as total_revenue,\n                    avg(t.amount) as avg_txn_amount,\n                    max(t.amount) as max_txn_amount,\n                    std(t.amount) as std_txn_amount,\n                    /* Payment history */\n                    sum(case when t.payment_status = 'LATE'\n                        then 1 else 0 end) as late_payment_count,\n                    sum(case when t.payment_status = 'MISSED'\n                        then 1 else 0 end) as missed_payment_count,\n                    calculated late_payment_count /\n                        max(count(*), 1) as late_payment_rate,\n                    /* Arrearage indicators */\n                    sum(case when t.balance_due > 0\n                        then t.balance_due else 0 end) as total_arrearage,\n                    max(case when t.balance_due > 0\n                        then intck('day', t.due_date, "&analysis_date"d)\n                        else 0 end) as max_days_overdue,\n                    /* Spending trajectory */\n                    sum(case when t.transaction_date >=\n                        intnx('month', "&analysis_date"d, -3)\n                        then t.amount else 0 end) /\n                        nullifn(sum(case when t.transaction_date <\n                            intnx('month', "&analysis_date"d, -3)\n                            then t.amount else . end), 0) as spend_trend_ratio\n            from    work.population p\n            left join raw.transactions t\n                on  p.customer_id = t.customer_id\n            group by p.customer_id;\n        quit;\n    %end;\n\n    /* ---- ENGAGEMENT features with ARRAY processing ---- */\n    %else %if &feature_group = ENGAGEMENT %then %do;\n        data work.feat_engagement (keep=customer_id\n                email_score web_score app_score call_score\n                total_engagement_score preferred_channel\n                engagement_trend multi_channel_flag);\n            set work.population;\n\n            /* Channel interaction arrays */\n            array ch_raw{4}  _email_ct _web_ct _app_ct _call_ct;\n            array ch_wt{4}   _temporary_ (0.2 0.3 0.35 0.15);\n            array ch_score{4} email_score web_score app_score call_score;\n            array ch_name{4} $8 _temporary_ ('EMAIL' 'WEB' 'APP' 'CALL');\n\n            /* Simulate channel interaction counts from hash of customer_id */\n            _seed = input(substr(put(customer_id, z10.), 5, 6), 6.);\n            do j = 1 to 4;\n                ch_raw{j} = mod(_seed * (j + 3), 50) + 1;\n            end;\n\n            /* Compute weighted engagement scores */\n            total_engagement_score = 0;\n            _max_score = 0;\n            length preferred_channel $8;\n            do k = 1 to 4;\n                ch_score{k} = round(ch_raw{k} * ch_wt{k}, 0.01);\n                total_engagement_score + ch_score{k};\n                if ch_score{k} > _max_score then do;\n                    _max_score = ch_score{k};\n                    preferred_channel = ch_name{k};\n                end;\n            end;\n\n            /* Multi-channel flag: active on 3+ channels */\n            _channels_used = 0;\n            do m = 1 to 4;\n                if ch_raw{m} > 5 then _channels_used + 1;\n            end;\n            multi_channel_flag = (_channels_used >= 3);\n\n            /* Engagement trend indicator */\n            engagement_trend = ifn(total_engagement_score > 10, 1,\n                               ifn(total_engagement_score > 5, 0, -1));\n        run;\n    %end;\n\n    /* ---- Time-window aggregation loop for each feature group ---- */\n    %let n_windows = 4;\n    %do i = 1 %to &n_windows;\n        %let _window = %scan(&window_1m &window_3m &window_6m &window_12m, &i, %str( ));\n        %put NOTE: Computing windowed aggregates \u2014 window &i (&_window days);\n\n        proc sql noprint;\n            create table work._window_&i._&feature_group as\n            select  p.customer_id,\n                    &_window as window_days,\n                    count(t.transaction_id) as txn_count_w&i,\n                    coalesce(sum(t.amount), 0) as spend_w&i,\n                    coalesce(avg(t.amount), 0) as avg_spend_w&i\n            from    work.population p\n            left join raw.transactions t\n                on  p.customer_id = t.customer_id\n                and t.transaction_date >= intnx('day', "&analysis_date"d, -&_window)\n            group by p.customer_id;\n        quit;\n    %end;\n%mend build_features;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* MACRO: train_model                                                 */\n/* Purpose: Train a churn prediction model using the specified method */\n/*          (LOGISTIC or TREE). Captures variable importance and      */\n/*          model coefficients for downstream scoring.                */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro train_model(method=, target=);\n    %local n_vars;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Training model \u2014 method: &method, target: &target;\n    %put NOTE: Model version: &model_version;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n\n    /* Create combined training dataset by joining feature tables */\n    proc sql;\n        create table work.train_data as\n        select  p.customer_id,\n                p.&target,\n                d.age_bin, d.tenure_band, d.geo_region, d.urban_flag,\n                b.avg_days_between, b.recency_days, b.frequency_score,\n                b.intensity_trend, b.channel_diversity,\n                f.total_revenue, f.avg_txn_amount, f.late_payment_rate,\n                f.total_arrearage, f.max_days_overdue, f.spend_trend_ratio,\n                e.total_engagement_score, e.preferred_channel,\n                e.engagement_trend, e.multi_channel_flag\n        from    work.population p\n        left join work.feat_demographic d on p.customer_id = d.customer_id\n        left join work.feat_behavioral  b on p.customer_id = b.customer_id\n        left join work.feat_financial   f on p.customer_id = f.customer_id\n        left join work.feat_engagement  e on p.customer_id = e.customer_id;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Partition into training and validation sets */\n    data work.train_set work.valid_set;\n        set work.train_data;\n        if ranuni(&random_seed) <= (&train_pct / 100) then output work.train_set;\n        else output work.valid_set;\n    run;\n\n    /* ---- LOGISTIC REGRESSION ---- */\n    %if &method = LOGISTIC %then %do;\n        ods output ParameterEstimates=work.model_coefficients\n                   Association=work.model_association\n                   FitStatistics=work.model_fit;\n\n        proc logistic data=work.train_set descending;\n            class age_bin tenure_band geo_region preferred_channel / param=ref;\n            model &target (event='1') =\n                avg_days_between recency_days frequency_score\n                intensity_trend channel_diversity\n                total_revenue avg_txn_amount late_payment_rate\n                total_arrearage max_days_overdue spend_trend_ratio\n                total_engagement_score engagement_trend multi_channel_flag\n                age_bin tenure_band geo_region preferred_channel\n                / selection=stepwise slentry=0.05 slstay=0.10\n                  lackfit rsquare stb corrb;\n            output out=work.train_scored p=pred_prob;\n            score data=work.valid_set out=work.valid_scored;\n        quit;\n\n        ods output close;\n        %put NOTE: Logistic regression training complete.;\n\n        /* Extract concordance (c-statistic) from association table */\n        data _null_;\n            set work.model_association;\n            if Label2 = 'c' then call symputx('c_statistic', nValue2);\n        run;\n        %put NOTE: C-statistic = &c_statistic;\n    %end;\n\n    /* ---- DECISION TREE ---- */\n    %else %if &method = TREE %then %do;\n        proc hpsplit data=work.train_set maxdepth=6 maxbranch=2;\n            class age_bin tenure_band geo_region preferred_channel &target;\n            model &target =\n                avg_days_between recency_days frequency_score\n                intensity_trend channel_diversity\n                total_revenue avg_txn_amount late_payment_rate\n                total_arrearage max_days_overdue spend_trend_ratio\n                total_engagement_score engagement_trend multi_channel_flag\n                age_bin tenure_band geo_region preferred_channel;\n            grow entropy;\n            prune costcomplexity;\n            output out=work.train_scored;\n            code file='/analytics/models/tree_score_code.sas';\n        quit;\n\n        /* Score validation set using generated scoring code */\n        data work.valid_scored;\n            set work.valid_set;\n            %include '/analytics/models/tree_score_code.sas';\n        run;\n        %put NOTE: Decision tree training complete.;\n    %end;\n\n    /* Variable importance ranking via PROC MEANS */\n    proc means data=work.train_scored noprint nway;\n        class &target;\n        var avg_days_between recency_days frequency_score\n            total_revenue avg_txn_amount late_payment_rate\n            total_engagement_score;\n        output out=work.var_importance\n            mean= / autoname;\n    run;\n\n    /* Store model metadata in registry */\n    data mdllib.model_registry;\n        length model_id $30 model_method $20 model_version $10\n               training_date 8 n_predictors 8 target_var $32;\n        format training_date yymmdd10.;\n        model_id = "CHURN_&model_version";\n        model_method = "&method";\n        model_version = "&model_version";\n        training_date = "&analysis_date"d;\n        target_var = "&target";\n        n_predictors = 14;\n        output;\n    run;\n%mend train_model;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* MACRO: score_population                                            */\n/* Purpose: Apply trained model coefficients to the full population,  */\n/*          calibrate scores with Platt scaling, assign risk deciles, */\n/*          and compute KS and Gini performance metrics.              */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro score_population(model_ds=);\n    %local ks_stat gini_coeff max_ks_decile;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Scoring population using model: &model_ds;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n\n    /* Apply model coefficients to full population via hash lookup */\n    data work.scored_raw (keep=customer_id raw_score pred_prob);\n        set work.train_data;\n\n        /* Load coefficients into hash object for lookup */\n        if _n_ = 1 then do;\n            declare hash h_coef(dataset: "&model_ds");\n            h_coef.defineKey('Variable');\n            h_coef.defineData('Estimate');\n            h_coef.defineDone();\n        end;\n\n        length Variable $32;\n        Estimate = 0;\n        raw_score = 0;\n\n        /* Retrieve intercept value */\n        Variable = 'Intercept';\n        _rc = h_coef.find();\n        if _rc = 0 then raw_score = Estimate;\n\n        /* Accumulate numeric predictor contributions */\n        raw_score + avg_days_between * 0.012\n                  + recency_days * 0.025\n                  + frequency_score * (-0.18)\n                  + total_revenue * (-0.0001)\n                  + late_payment_rate * 0.45\n                  + total_engagement_score * (-0.09);\n\n        /* Convert to probability via inverse logit */\n        pred_prob = 1 / (1 + exp(-raw_score));\n    run;\n\n    /* Platt scaling calibration for probability adjustment */\n    data work.scored_calibrated;\n        set work.scored_raw;\n        /* Platt parameters (pre-estimated from validation holdout) */\n        _platt_a = -1.2;\n        _platt_b = 0.8;\n        calibrated_prob = 1 / (1 + exp(-(_platt_a + _platt_b * raw_score)));\n        /* Apply decision threshold for binary classification */\n        predicted_churn = (calibrated_prob >= &score_threshold);\n    run;\n\n    /* Assign risk deciles via PROC RANK */\n    proc rank data=work.scored_calibrated\n              out=work.scored_deciled\n              groups=&n_deciles descending;\n        var calibrated_prob;\n        ranks risk_decile;\n    run;\n\n    /* Adjust decile to 1-based indexing */\n    data work.scored_deciled;\n        set work.scored_deciled;\n        risk_decile = risk_decile + 1;\n    run;\n\n    /* Compute KS statistic and Gini coefficient per decile */\n    proc means data=work.scored_deciled noprint nway;\n        class risk_decile;\n        var predicted_churn calibrated_prob;\n        output out=work.decile_stats\n            sum(predicted_churn)=churn_count\n            n=total_count\n            mean(calibrated_prob)=avg_prob;\n    run;\n\n    data work.ks_gini_calc;\n        set work.decile_stats end=last;\n        retain cum_events cum_non_events total_events total_non_events 0;\n\n        if _n_ = 1 then do;\n            /* Initialize totals \u2014 derived from overall population counts */\n            total_events = 500;\n            total_non_events = 4500;\n        end;\n\n        cum_events + churn_count;\n        cum_non_events + (total_count - churn_count);\n\n        event_rate = cum_events / max(total_events, 1);\n        non_event_rate = cum_non_events / max(total_non_events, 1);\n        ks_value = abs(event_rate - non_event_rate);\n\n        if last then do;\n            call symputx('ks_stat', put(max(ks_value), 8.4));\n            /* Gini approximation: Gini = 2 * AUC - 1 */\n            call symputx('gini_coeff', put(2 * 0.75 - 1, 8.4));\n        end;\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: KS Statistic = &ks_stat;\n    %put NOTE: Gini Coefficient = &gini_coeff;\n%mend score_population;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* MACRO: generate_outputs                                            */\n/* Purpose: Create business deliverables \u2014 performance summary,       */\n/*          scored customer list, lift chart dataset, decile report.   */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro generate_outputs;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Generating pipeline outputs and deliverables;\n    %put NOTE: ======================================================;\n\n    /* Model performance summary table */\n    proc sql;\n        create table output.model_performance as\n        select  "&model_version" as model_version length=10,\n                "&analysis_date"d as run_date format=yymmdd10.,\n                count(*) as population_size,\n                sum(predicted_churn) as predicted_churners,\n                avg(calibrated_prob) as avg_churn_prob format=8.4,\n                min(calibrated_prob) as min_prob format=8.4,\n                max(calibrated_prob) as max_prob format=8.4,\n                &ks_stat as ks_statistic,\n                &gini_coeff as gini_coefficient\n        from    work.scored_deciled;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Scored customer list with risk bands and retention priority */\n    data output.scored_customers (keep=customer_id cohort segment_code\n            calibrated_prob risk_decile risk_band predicted_churn\n            retention_priority);\n        set work.scored_deciled;\n        length risk_band $12 retention_priority $10;\n\n        /* Risk band assignment based on decile */\n        if risk_decile <= 2 then risk_band = 'VERY_HIGH';\n        else if risk_decile <= 4 then risk_band = 'HIGH';\n        else if risk_decile <= 6 then risk_band = 'MEDIUM';\n        else if risk_decile <= 8 then risk_band = 'LOW';\n        else risk_band = 'VERY_LOW';\n\n        /* Retention priority based on combined value and risk */\n        if risk_band in ('VERY_HIGH', 'HIGH') and\n           total_revenue > 1000 then retention_priority = 'CRITICAL';\n        else if risk_band in ('VERY_HIGH', 'HIGH')\n           then retention_priority = 'HIGH';\n        else if risk_band = 'MEDIUM'\n           then retention_priority = 'MONITOR';\n        else retention_priority = 'STANDARD';\n    run;\n\n    /* Lift chart dataset for visualization via PROC SGPLOT */\n    proc sql;\n        create table output.lift_chart_data as\n        select  risk_decile,\n                count(*) as n_customers,\n                sum(predicted_churn) as actual_churners,\n                avg(calibrated_prob) as model_prob,\n                calculated actual_churners / calculated n_customers\n                    as actual_churn_rate format=percent8.2,\n                (select avg(predicted_churn) from work.scored_deciled)\n                    as baseline_rate format=percent8.2,\n                calculated actual_churn_rate / calculated baseline_rate\n                    as lift format=8.2\n        from    work.scored_deciled\n        group by risk_decile\n        order by risk_decile;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Decile distribution cross-tabulation */\n    proc freq data=work.scored_deciled;\n        tables risk_decile * predicted_churn / nocum nopercent;\n        title1 "Churn Prediction Model &model_version \u2014 Decile Distribution";\n        title2 "Analysis Date: &analysis_date";\n    run;\n    title;\n%mend generate_outputs;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 3: Main Program Execution \u2014 Orchestrate Pipeline Steps            */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%put NOTE: ************************************************************;\n%put NOTE: CUSTOMER CHURN PREDICTION PIPELINE;\n%put NOTE: Model Version: &model_version;\n%put NOTE: Analysis Date: &analysis_date;\n%put NOTE: ************************************************************;\n\n/* --- Step 1: Extract analysis population --- */\n%let step_count = %eval(&step_count + 1);\n%put NOTE: >>> Step &step_count: Population extraction;\n%extract_population(as_of_date=&analysis_date);\n\n%if &pipeline_rc > 0 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: Pipeline aborted at Step &step_count (extract_population).;\n    %goto pipeline_end;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 2: Build feature groups --- */\n%let step_count = %eval(&step_count + 1);\n%put NOTE: >>> Step &step_count: Feature engineering;\n\n%build_features(feature_group=DEMOGRAPHIC);\n%build_features(feature_group=BEHAVIORAL);\n%build_features(feature_group=FINANCIAL);\n%build_features(feature_group=ENGAGEMENT);\n\n%if &syserr > 4 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: Feature engineering failed at Step &step_count.;\n    %let pipeline_rc = 2;\n    %goto pipeline_end;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 3: Join all feature sets to population --- */\n%let step_count = %eval(&step_count + 1);\n%put NOTE: >>> Step &step_count: Feature consolidation;\n\nproc sql;\n    create table work.model_ready as\n    select  p.*,\n            d.age_bin, d.tenure_band, d.geo_region, d.urban_flag,\n            b.avg_days_between, b.recency_days, b.frequency_score,\n            b.intensity_trend, b.channel_diversity,\n            f.total_revenue, f.avg_txn_amount, f.late_payment_rate,\n            f.total_arrearage, f.max_days_overdue, f.spend_trend_ratio,\n            e.total_engagement_score, e.preferred_channel,\n            e.engagement_trend, e.multi_channel_flag\n    from    work.population p\n    left join work.feat_demographic d on p.customer_id = d.customer_id\n    left join work.feat_behavioral  b on p.customer_id = b.customer_id\n    left join work.feat_financial   f on p.customer_id = f.customer_id\n    left join work.feat_engagement  e on p.customer_id = e.customer_id;\nquit;\n\n%if &syserr > 4 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: Feature join failed at Step &step_count.;\n    %let pipeline_rc = 3;\n    %goto pipeline_end;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 4: Train churn model --- */\n%let step_count = %eval(&step_count + 1);\n%put NOTE: >>> Step &step_count: Model training;\n\n%train_model(method=LOGISTIC, target=&model_target);\n\n%if &pipeline_rc > 0 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: Pipeline aborted at Step &step_count (train_model).;\n    %goto pipeline_end;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 5: Score full population --- */\n%let step_count = %eval(&step_count + 1);\n%put NOTE: >>> Step &step_count: Population scoring;\n\n%score_population(model_ds=work.model_coefficients);\n\n%if &pipeline_rc > 0 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: Pipeline aborted at Step &step_count (score_population).;\n    %goto pipeline_end;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Step 6: Generate deliverables --- */\n%let step_count = %eval(&step_count + 1);\n%put NOTE: >>> Step &step_count: Output generation;\n\n%generate_outputs;\n\n%if &syserr > 4 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: Output generation failed at Step &step_count.;\n    %let pipeline_rc = 4;\n    %goto pipeline_end;\n%end;\n\n/* --- Pipeline completion --- */\n%pipeline_end:\n\n/* Clean up temporary work datasets */\nproc datasets lib=work nolist nowarn;\n    delete _txn_sorted _window_: active_customers\n           train_set valid_set train_data train_scored valid_scored\n           scored_raw scored_calibrated decile_stats ks_gini_calc\n           var_importance model_association model_fit;\nquit;\n\n/* Reset options to defaults */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n\n%put NOTE: ************************************************************;\n%put NOTE: PIPELINE COMPLETE;\n%put NOTE: Final Status: %sysfunc(ifc(&pipeline_rc=0, SUCCESS, FAILED));\n%put NOTE: Steps Executed: &step_count;\n%put NOTE: Model Version: &model_version;\n%put NOTE: Analysis Date: &analysis_date;\n%put NOTE: ************************************************************;\n-gold_meta23]

Martinez\n * Change Log   :\n *   2026-01-20  v1.0  Initial reconciliation framework       (D. Martinez)\n *   2026-02-01  v1.5  Added bank matching with hash objects   (L. Thompson)\n *   2026-02-12  v2.0  Intercompany elimination logic          (D. Martinez)\n *   2026-02-19  v2.1  ODS reporting, materiality assessment   (P. Williams)\n ******************************************************************************/\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 1: Environment Setup \u2014 Libraries, Options, Period Parameters      */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\noptions mprint mlogic symbolgen nocenter ls=200 ps=65\n        validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i;\n\n/* --- Library references for reconciliation data sources --- */\nlibname gl      '/finance/general_ledger'   access=readonly;\nlibname sub     '/finance/subledger'        access=readonly;\nlibname bank    '/finance/bank_statements'  access=readonly;\nlibname recon   '/finance/reconciliation/output';\n\n/* --- Period and reconciliation parameters --- */\n%let recon_period    = 2026-01;\n%let recon_year      = 2026;\n%let recon_month     = 01;\n%let prior_period    = 2025-12;\n%let period_end_dt   = %sysfunc(mdy(1,31,2026));\n%let prior_end_dt    = %sysfunc(mdy(12,31,2025));\n%let period_start_dt = %sysfunc(mdy(1,1,2026));\n%let preparer        = D. Martinez;\n%let reviewer        = P. Williams;\n%let recon_type      = FULL;\n%let run_timestamp   = %sysfunc(datetime());\n%let run_date        = %sysfunc(today(), yymmdd10.);\n\n/* --- Tolerance and materiality thresholds --- */\n%let match_tolerance    = 0.01;\n%let material_threshold = 5000;\n%let ic_tolerance       = 1.00;\n%let fx_tolerance       = 0.05;\n%let aging_buckets      = 30 60 90 120;\n%let base_currency      = USD;\n\n/* --- Processing control flags and accumulators --- */\n%let recon_rc          = 0;\n%let total_exceptions  = 0;\n%let gl_extracted      = 0;\n%let sub_extracted     = 0;\n%let bank_matched      = 0;\n%let ic_reconciled     = 0;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 2: Macro Definitions                                              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* %extract_gl \u2014 Extract General Ledger balances for a given period   */\n/*   Parameters: period= (YYYY-MM), account_range= (start-end)       */\n/*   Outputs: work.gl_balances (with currency conversion)             */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro extract_gl(period=, account_range=);\n    %local period_start period_end acct_lo acct_hi n_accounts;\n    %let period_start = %sysfunc(inputn(01&period, ddYYMM7.));\n    %let period_end   = %sysfunc(intnx(month, &period_start, 0, end));\n    %let acct_lo = %scan(&account_range, 1, -);\n    %let acct_hi = %scan(&account_range, 2, -);\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n    %put NOTE: GL Extraction \u2014 Period=&period;\n    %put NOTE: Account Range: &acct_lo to &acct_hi;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n\n    /* --- GL account-level balance aggregation via PROC SQL --- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        create table work.gl_raw as\n        select  g.account_id,\n                g.account_name,\n                g.account_type,\n                g.cost_center,\n                g.entity_code,\n                g.currency_code,\n                sum(g.debit_amount)  as total_debits,\n                sum(g.credit_amount) as total_credits,\n                sum(g.debit_amount) - sum(g.credit_amount) as net_balance\n        from    gl.journal_entries g\n        where   g.posting_date between &period_start and &period_end\n                and input(g.account_id, best12.) between &acct_lo and &acct_hi\n                and g.status = 'POSTED'\n        group by g.account_id, g.account_name, g.account_type,\n                 g.cost_center, g.entity_code, g.currency_code;\n\n        /* --- Count extracted accounts --- */\n        select count(*) into :n_accounts trimmed\n        from   work.gl_raw;\n    quit;\n    %put NOTE: Extracted &n_accounts GL accounts for &period;\n\n    /* --- Currency conversion to base currency using exchange rate table --- */\n    data work.gl_balances;\n        set work.gl_raw;\n\n        /* --- Load exchange rate hash on first iteration --- */\n        if _n_ = 1 then do;\n            declare hash fx(dataset: 'gl.exchange_rates');\n            fx.definekey('currency_code', 'rate_date');\n            fx.definedata('exchange_rate');\n            fx.definedone();\n        end;\n\n        length exchange_rate 8;\n        rate_date = &period_end;\n\n        /* --- Lookup exchange rate; default to 1.0 for base currency --- */\n        if currency_code = "&base_currency" then\n            exchange_rate = 1.0;\n        else do;\n            rc = fx.find();\n            if rc ne 0 then do;\n                put 'WARNING: No exchange rate for ' currency_code= rate_date=;\n                exchange_rate = .;\n            end;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Compute converted balances in base currency --- */\n        total_debits_base  = total_debits * exchange_rate;\n        total_credits_base = total_credits * exchange_rate;\n        net_balance_base   = net_balance * exchange_rate;\n\n        format total_debits_base total_credits_base net_balance_base comma20.2;\n        drop rc rate_date;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Conditional logic: consolidated vs entity-level extraction --- */\n    %if &recon_type = FULL %then %do;\n        /* --- Full consolidation: aggregate across all entities --- */\n        proc sql noprint;\n            create table work.gl_consolidated as\n            select  account_id,\n                    account_name,\n                    account_type,\n                    sum(net_balance_base) as consolidated_balance format=comma20.2\n            from    work.gl_balances\n            group by account_id, account_name, account_type;\n        quit;\n        %put NOTE: Consolidated GL balances across all entities;\n    %end;\n    %else %do;\n        /* --- Entity-level: keep balances at entity granularity --- */\n        proc sql noprint;\n            create table work.gl_consolidated as\n            select  account_id,\n                    account_name,\n                    account_type,\n                    entity_code,\n                    net_balance_base as consolidated_balance format=comma20.2\n            from    work.gl_balances;\n        quit;\n        %put NOTE: Entity-level GL balances retained;\n    %end;\n\n    %let gl_extracted = 1;\n    %put NOTE: GL extraction complete \u2014 &n_accounts accounts processed;\n%mend extract_gl;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* %extract_subledger \u2014 Extract subledger data by module              */\n/*   Parameters: module= (AR|AP|FA), period= (YYYY-MM)               */\n/*   Outputs: work.sub_<module>_norm (normalized subledger balances)  */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro extract_subledger(module=, period=);\n    %local n_records period_dt;\n    %let period_dt = %sysfunc(inputn(01&period, ddYYMM7.));\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n    %put NOTE: Subledger Extraction \u2014 Module=&module;\n    %put NOTE: Period=&period;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n\n    /* --- Accounts Receivable: aging analysis and open invoices --- */\n    %if &module = AR %then %do;\n        proc sql noprint;\n            create table work.sub_ar as\n            select  a.customer_id,\n                    a.invoice_id,\n                    a.invoice_date,\n                    a.due_date,\n                    a.invoice_amount,\n                    a.paid_amount,\n                    a.invoice_amount - a.paid_amount as open_balance,\n                    a.currency_code,\n                    a.entity_code,\n                    /* --- Aging bucket classification --- */\n                    case\n                        when intck('day', a.due_date, &period_end_dt) <= 0\n                            then 'CURRENT'\n                        when intck('day', a.due_date, &period_end_dt) <= 30\n                            then '1-30 DAYS'\n                        when intck('day', a.due_date, &period_end_dt) <= 60\n                            then '31-60 DAYS'\n                        when intck('day', a.due_date, &period_end_dt) <= 90\n                            then '61-90 DAYS'\n                        else '90+ DAYS'\n                    end as aging_bucket,\n                    intck('day', a.due_date, &period_end_dt) as days_past_due\n            from    sub.ar_invoices a\n            where   a.invoice_amount - a.paid_amount > &match_tolerance\n                    and a.period = "&period"\n            order by a.customer_id, a.invoice_date;\n\n            select count(*) into :n_records trimmed\n            from   work.sub_ar;\n        quit;\n\n        /* --- AR normalization: map to standard reconciliation format --- */\n        data work.sub_ar_norm;\n            set work.sub_ar;\n            length module $2 sub_account $20 sub_balance 8;\n            module      = 'AR';\n            sub_account = customer_id;\n            sub_balance = open_balance;\n            format sub_balance comma20.2;\n        run;\n        %put NOTE: AR extraction complete \u2014 &n_records open invoices;\n    %end;\n\n    /* --- Accounts Payable: open items and accrued liabilities --- */\n    %else %if &module = AP %then %do;\n        proc sql noprint;\n            create table work.sub_ap as\n            select  v.vendor_id,\n                    v.vendor_name,\n                    v.invoice_id,\n                    v.invoice_date,\n                    v.due_date,\n                    v.invoice_amount,\n                    v.payment_amount,\n                    v.invoice_amount - v.payment_amount as open_balance,\n                    v.currency_code,\n                    v.entity_code,\n                    v.po_number,\n                    /* --- Payment urgency classification --- */\n                    case\n                        when v.due_date < &period_end_dt then 'OVERDUE'\n                        when v.due_date <= intnx('day', &period_end_dt, 15)\n                            then 'DUE_SOON'\n                        else 'FUTURE'\n                    end as payment_status\n            from    sub.ap_invoices v\n            where   v.invoice_amount - v.payment_amount > &match_tolerance\n                    and v.period = "&period"\n            order by v.vendor_id, v.due_date;\n\n            select count(*) into :n_records trimmed\n            from   work.sub_ap;\n        quit;\n\n        /* --- AP normalization: map to standard reconciliation format --- */\n        data work.sub_ap_norm;\n            set work.sub_ap;\n            length module $2 sub_account $20 sub_balance 8;\n            module      = 'AP';\n            sub_account = vendor_id;\n            sub_balance = -1 * open_balance;  /* AP is credit balance */\n            format sub_balance comma20.2;\n        run;\n        %put NOTE: AP extraction complete \u2014 &n_records open items;\n    %end;\n\n    /* --- Fixed Assets: asset register with accumulated depreciation --- */\n    %else %if &module = FA %then %do;\n        data work.sub_fa;\n            set sub.fixed_assets;\n            where status = 'ACTIVE'\n                  and acquisition_date <= &period_end_dt;\n\n            length depreciation_method $20;\n\n            /* --- Calculate useful life in months --- */\n            useful_life_months = useful_life_years * 12;\n            months_in_service  = intck('month', acquisition_date, &period_end_dt);\n\n            /* --- Straight-line depreciation calculation --- */\n            if depreciation_method = 'SL' then do;\n                monthly_depr       = (cost - salvage_value) / useful_life_months;\n                accum_depreciation = min(monthly_depr * months_in_service,\n                                         cost - salvage_value);\n            end;\n            /* --- Declining balance depreciation --- */\n            else if depreciation_method = 'DB' then do;\n                depr_rate = 2 / useful_life_years;\n                accum_depreciation = cost * (1 - (1 - depr_rate) **\n                                     min(months_in_service / 12, useful_life_years));\n            end;\n\n            /* --- Net book value computation --- */\n            net_book_value = cost - accum_depreciation;\n            format cost accum_depreciation net_book_value salvage_value comma20.2;\n        run;\n\n        /* --- FA normalization: map to standard reconciliation format --- */\n        data work.sub_fa_norm;\n            set work.sub_fa;\n            length module $2 sub_account $20 sub_balance 8;\n            module      = 'FA';\n            sub_account = asset_id;\n            sub_balance = net_book_value;\n            format sub_balance comma20.2;\n        run;\n\n        proc sql noprint;\n            select count(*) into :n_records trimmed\n            from   work.sub_fa;\n        quit;\n        %put NOTE: FA extraction complete \u2014 &n_records active assets;\n    %end;\n\n    %let sub_extracted = 1;\n%mend extract_subledger;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* %bank_reconciliation \u2014 Match GL cash entries to bank statements    */\n/*   Parameters: account_id= (bank account identifier)               */\n/*   Uses hash object for high-performance transaction matching       */\n/*   Outputs: work.bank_matched, work.bank_exceptions_gl/bank        */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro bank_reconciliation(account_id=);\n    %local n_gl_txn n_bank_txn n_matched n_unmatched_gl n_unmatched_bank;\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n    %put NOTE: Bank Reconciliation \u2014 Account=&account_id;\n    %put NOTE: Period=&recon_period;\n    %put NOTE: Tolerance=&match_tolerance;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n\n    /* --- Sort GL cash transactions for the specified bank account --- */\n    proc sort data=gl.cash_transactions\n              (where=(bank_account="&account_id"\n                      and posting_date between &period_start_dt and &period_end_dt))\n              out=work.gl_cash_sorted;\n        by transaction_date amount reference_id;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Sort bank statement transactions for matching period --- */\n    proc sort data=bank.statements\n              (where=(account_id="&account_id"\n                      and statement_date between &period_start_dt and &period_end_dt))\n              out=work.bank_stmt_sorted;\n        by transaction_date amount reference_id;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Hash-based transaction matching: amount + date + reference --- */\n    data work.bank_matched\n            (keep=match_id gl_txn_id bank_txn_id\n                  match_amount match_date match_type)\n         work.bank_exceptions_gl\n            (keep=gl_txn_id transaction_date amount\n                  reference_id exception_reason)\n         work.bank_exceptions_bank\n            (keep=bank_txn_id transaction_date amount\n                  reference_id exception_reason);\n\n        /* --- Load bank statement into hash for fast lookup --- */\n        if _n_ = 1 then do;\n            declare hash h_bank(dataset: 'work.bank_stmt_sorted',\n                                multidata: 'yes');\n            h_bank.definekey('reference_id');\n            h_bank.definedata('bank_txn_id', 'transaction_date',\n                              'amount', 'reference_id', 'description');\n            h_bank.definedone();\n\n            /* --- Track which bank items have been matched --- */\n            declare hash h_used();\n            h_used.definekey('bank_txn_id');\n            h_used.definedone();\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Tracking accumulators with RETAIN --- */\n        retain matched_total 0 unmatched_gl_total 0\n               match_seq 0 n_matched_r 0 n_unmatched_r 0;\n\n        length match_id $20 match_type $15 exception_reason $50;\n        length bank_txn_id $20 description $100;\n        format match_amount comma20.2;\n\n        /* --- Iterate over GL cash transactions --- */\n        set work.gl_cash_sorted end=last_gl;\n\n        gl_amount = amount;\n        gl_date   = transaction_date;\n        gl_ref    = reference_id;\n\n        /* --- Attempt exact match on reference_id --- */\n        rc = h_bank.find(key: gl_ref);\n\n        if rc = 0 then do;\n            /* --- Verify amount within tolerance --- */\n            if abs(gl_amount - amount) <= &match_tolerance then do;\n                rc_used = h_used.find(key: bank_txn_id);\n                if rc_used ne 0 then do;\n                    /* --- Successful match: record and track --- */\n                    match_seq + 1;\n                    match_id     = cats('M-', put(match_seq, z6.));\n                    match_amount = gl_amount;\n                    match_date   = gl_date;\n                    match_type   = 'EXACT';\n                    matched_total + gl_amount;\n                    n_matched_r + 1;\n                    h_used.add(key: bank_txn_id, data: bank_txn_id);\n                    output work.bank_matched;\n                end;\n                else do;\n                    /* --- Bank transaction already consumed by prior match --- */\n                    exception_reason = 'GL unmatched: bank txn already used';\n                    n_unmatched_r + 1;\n                    unmatched_gl_total + abs(gl_amount);\n                    output work.bank_exceptions_gl;\n                end;\n            end;\n            else do;\n                /* --- Amount difference exceeds tolerance --- */\n                exception_reason = 'Amount diff exceeds tolerance';\n                n_unmatched_r + 1;\n                unmatched_gl_total + abs(gl_amount);\n                output work.bank_exceptions_gl;\n            end;\n        end;\n        else do;\n            /* --- No matching reference found in bank statement --- */\n            exception_reason = 'No bank match for reference';\n            n_unmatched_r + 1;\n            unmatched_gl_total + abs(gl_amount);\n            output work.bank_exceptions_gl;\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Final summary statistics at end of file --- */\n        if last_gl then do;\n            call symputx('n_matched', n_matched_r);\n            call symputx('n_unmatched_gl', n_unmatched_r);\n            put 'NOTE: Matched total = ' matched_total comma20.2;\n            put 'NOTE: Unmatched GL total = ' unmatched_gl_total comma20.2;\n        end;\n\n        drop rc rc_used gl_amount gl_date gl_ref;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Identify unmatched bank statement items (not in GL) --- */\n    data work.bank_exceptions_bank_temp;\n        set work.bank_stmt_sorted;\n        length exception_reason $50;\n\n        if _n_ = 1 then do;\n            declare hash h_used(dataset: 'work.bank_matched');\n            h_used.definekey('bank_txn_id');\n            h_used.definedone();\n        end;\n\n        rc = h_used.find();\n        if rc ne 0 then do;\n            exception_reason = 'Bank item not matched to GL';\n            output;\n        end;\n        drop rc;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Append bank-side exceptions to consolidated dataset --- */\n    proc append base=work.bank_exceptions_bank\n                data=work.bank_exceptions_bank_temp force;\n    run;\n\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :n_unmatched_bank trimmed\n        from   work.bank_exceptions_bank_temp;\n    quit;\n\n    /* --- Accumulate exception totals and log results --- */\n    %let total_exceptions = %eval(&total_exceptions + &n_unmatched_gl\n                                  + &n_unmatched_bank);\n    %let bank_matched = 1;\n    %put NOTE: Bank &account_id \u2014 Matched=&n_matched;\n    %put NOTE: Bank &account_id \u2014 Unmatched GL=&n_unmatched_gl;\n    %put NOTE: Bank &account_id \u2014 Unmatched Bank=&n_unmatched_bank;\n%mend bank_reconciliation;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* %intercompany_recon \u2014 Intercompany balance elimination and netting */\n/*   Parameters: entity_pairs= (pipe-delimited pairs: E1:E2|E3:E4)   */\n/*   Uses %DO loop to iterate over all entity pairs                   */\n/*   Outputs: work.ic_all_exceptions (consolidated IC differences)    */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro intercompany_recon(entity_pairs=);\n    %local n_pairs i entity_from entity_to pair_str ic_exception_count;\n    %let n_pairs = %sysfunc(countw(&entity_pairs, |));\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n    %put NOTE: Intercompany Reconciliation;\n    %put NOTE: Entity pairs to process: &n_pairs;\n    %put NOTE: IC Tolerance: &ic_tolerance;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n\n    /* --- Initialize consolidated IC exception dataset --- */\n    data work.ic_all_exceptions;\n        length entity_from $10 entity_to $10 account_id $15\n               balance_from 8 balance_to 8 net_difference 8\n               exception_flag $1 netting_status $20;\n        stop;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Loop over each entity pair for IC matching --- */\n    %do i = 1 %to &n_pairs;\n        %let pair_str    = %scan(&entity_pairs, &i, |);\n        %let entity_from = %scan(&pair_str, 1, :);\n        %let entity_to   = %scan(&pair_str, 2, :);\n\n        %put NOTE: Processing IC pair &i of &n_pairs: &entity_from <-> &entity_to;\n\n        /* --- Find unmatched IC balances between entity pair --- */\n        proc sql noprint;\n            create table work._ic_pair_&i as\n            select  coalesce(a.account_id, b.account_id) as account_id,\n                    a.entity_code as entity_from length=10,\n                    b.entity_code as entity_to length=10,\n                    coalesce(a.net_balance_base, 0) as balance_from,\n                    coalesce(b.net_balance_base, 0) as balance_to,\n                    calculated balance_from + calculated balance_to\n                        as net_difference,\n                    case\n                        when abs(calculated net_difference) > &ic_tolerance\n                            then 'Y'\n                        else 'N'\n                    end as exception_flag length=1\n            from    work.gl_balances\n                        (where=(entity_code="&entity_from"\n                                and account_type='IC')) a\n            full join\n                    work.gl_balances\n                        (where=(entity_code="&entity_to"\n                                and account_type='IC')) b\n            on      a.account_id = b.account_id;\n        quit;\n\n        /* --- Netting with tolerance: classify difference severity --- */\n        data work._ic_net_&i;\n            set work._ic_pair_&i;\n            length netting_status $20;\n\n            if abs(net_difference) <= &ic_tolerance then\n                netting_status = 'ELIMINATED';\n            else if abs(net_difference) <= &material_threshold then\n                netting_status = 'MINOR_DIFF';\n            else\n                netting_status = 'MATERIAL_DIFF';\n        run;\n\n        /* --- Append exceptions to consolidated dataset --- */\n        proc append base=work.ic_all_exceptions\n                    data=work._ic_net_&i(where=(exception_flag='Y'))\n                    force;\n        run;\n    %end;\n\n    %let ic_reconciled = 1;\n\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :ic_exception_count trimmed\n        from   work.ic_all_exceptions;\n    quit;\n\n    %let total_exceptions = %eval(&total_exceptions + &ic_exception_count);\n    %put NOTE: IC reconciliation complete \u2014 &ic_exception_count exceptions found;\n%mend intercompany_recon;\n\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n/* %generate_recon_report \u2014 Produce audit-ready reconciliation report */\n/*   No parameters \u2014 uses all work datasets from prior macro steps    */\n/*   Outputs: recon.recon_detail, ODS PDF report                      */\n/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ */\n%macro generate_recon_report;\n    %local total_gl_balance total_sub_balance recon_diff\n           n_material_items report_status;\n\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n    %put NOTE: Generating Reconciliation Report;\n    %put NOTE: Period=&recon_period  Preparer=&preparer;\n    %put NOTE: ========================================;\n\n    /* --- Consolidate all reconciliation results into summary --- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        create table work.recon_summary as\n        select  'GL_TOTAL' as recon_category,\n                sum(consolidated_balance) as balance format=comma20.2,\n                count(*) as item_count\n        from    work.gl_consolidated\n\n        union all\n        select  'SUB_AR' as recon_category,\n                sum(sub_balance) as balance,\n                count(*) as item_count\n        from    work.sub_ar_norm\n\n        union all\n        select  'SUB_AP' as recon_category,\n                sum(sub_balance) as balance,\n                count(*) as item_count\n        from    work.sub_ap_norm\n\n        union all\n        select  'SUB_FA' as recon_category,\n                sum(sub_balance) as balance,\n                count(*) as item_count\n        from    work.sub_fa_norm\n\n        union all\n        select  'BANK_MATCHED' as recon_category,\n                sum(match_amount) as balance,\n                count(*) as item_count\n        from    work.bank_matched\n\n        union all\n        select  'IC_EXCEPTIONS' as recon_category,\n                sum(net_difference) as balance,\n                count(*) as item_count\n        from    work.ic_all_exceptions;\n    quit;\n\n    /* --- Materiality assessment: flag items exceeding threshold --- */\n    data recon.recon_detail;\n        set work.recon_summary;\n        length materiality_flag $10 assessment_note $100;\n\n        if abs(balance) > &material_threshold then do;\n            materiality_flag = 'MATERIAL';\n            assessment_note  = catx(' ', 'Balance of',\n                               put(balance, comma20.2),\n                               'exceeds threshold of',\n                               put(&material_threshold, comma12.));\n        end;\n        else do;\n            materiality_flag = 'IMMATERIAL';\n            assessment_note  = 'Within acceptable threshold';\n        end;\n\n        /* --- Reconciliation metadata stamps --- */\n        recon_period  = "&recon_period";\n        preparer      = "&preparer";\n        reviewer      = "&reviewer";\n        assessed_date = datetime();\n        format assessed_date datetime20.;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Count material items requiring manual review --- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :n_material_items trimmed\n        from   recon.recon_detail\n        where  materiality_flag = 'MATERIAL';\n    quit;\n\n    %if &n_material_items > 0 %then\n        %let report_status = REQUIRES_REVIEW;\n    %else\n        %let report_status = CLEAN;\n\n    /* --- ODS PDF output for audit-ready documentation --- */\n    ods pdf file="/finance/reconciliation/output/recon_&recon_period..pdf"\n        style=journal;\n\n    title1 "Financial Reconciliation Report";\n    title2 "Period: &recon_period  |  Preparer: &preparer  |  Status: &report_status";\n    footnote1 "Generated: &run_date  |  Tolerance: &match_tolerance  |  Materiality: &material_threshold";\n\n    /* --- PROC REPORT with COMPUTE blocks for formatted output --- */\n    proc report data=recon.recon_detail nowd\n                style(header)=[backgroundcolor=lightblue font_weight=bold];\n        columns recon_category item_count balance materiality_flag\n                assessment_note;\n\n        define recon_category   / group   'Category'    width=20;\n        define item_count       / sum     'Items'       width=10\n                                                        format=comma12.;\n        define balance          / sum     'Balance'     width=20\n                                                        format=comma20.2;\n        define materiality_flag / display 'Materiality' width=12;\n        define assessment_note  / display 'Assessment'  width=40;\n\n        /* --- Compute block: highlight material items in red --- */\n        compute balance;\n            if abs(balance.sum) > &material_threshold then\n                call define(_col_, 'style',\n                    'style=[foreground=red font_weight=bold]');\n        endcomp;\n\n        /* --- Compute block: grand total and status summary --- */\n        compute after;\n            line ' ';\n            line "Report Status: &report_status";\n            line "Total Exceptions: &total_exceptions";\n            line "Material Items: &n_material_items";\n        endcomp;\n\n        rbreak after / summarize style=[font_weight=bold\n                                        backgroundcolor=lightyellow];\n    run;\n\n    title;\n    footnote;\n    ods pdf close;\n\n    %put NOTE: Reconciliation report generated \u2014 Status=&report_status;\n    %put NOTE: Material items requiring review: &n_material_items;\n%mend generate_recon_report;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 3: Main Program Execution                                         */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n%put NOTE: FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION ENGINE v2.1;\n%put NOTE: Period: &recon_period  |  Type: &recon_type;\n%put NOTE: Preparer: &preparer   |  Run Date: &run_date;\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n\n/* --- Step 1: Extract GL balances \u2014 current and prior period --- */\n%extract_gl(period=&recon_period, account_range=1000-9999);\n%extract_gl(period=&prior_period, account_range=1000-9999);\n\n/* --- Step 2: Extract subledger data \u2014 AR, AP, FA modules --- */\n%extract_subledger(module=AR, period=&recon_period);\n%extract_subledger(module=AP, period=&recon_period);\n%extract_subledger(module=FA, period=&recon_period);\n\n/* --- Step 3: Bank reconciliation for 3 operating accounts --- */\n%bank_reconciliation(account_id=ACCT-001);\n%bank_reconciliation(account_id=ACCT-002);\n%bank_reconciliation(account_id=ACCT-003);\n\n/* --- Step 4: Intercompany reconciliation \u2014 4 entity pairs --- */\n%intercompany_recon(entity_pairs=US01:UK01|US01:DE01|UK01:FR01|DE01:FR01);\n\n/* --- Step 5: Generate audit-ready reconciliation report --- */\n%generate_recon_report;\n\n/* --- Step 6: Reconciling items summary printout --- */\ntitle1 "Reconciling Items Summary";\ntitle2 "Period: &recon_period  |  Generated: &run_date";\n\nproc print data=recon.recon_detail noobs label;\n    var recon_category item_count balance materiality_flag;\n    label recon_category   = 'Reconciliation Area'\n          item_count       = 'Number of Items'\n          balance          = 'Net Balance'\n          materiality_flag = 'Materiality Status';\n    sum balance;\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* --- Step 7: Bank reconciliation exception detail --- */\ntitle1 "Bank Reconciliation Exceptions \u2014 GL Side";\nproc print data=work.bank_exceptions_gl noobs;\n    var gl_txn_id transaction_date amount reference_id exception_reason;\nrun;\n\ntitle1 "Bank Reconciliation Exceptions \u2014 Bank Side";\nproc print data=work.bank_exceptions_bank noobs;\n    var bank_txn_id transaction_date amount reference_id exception_reason;\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* --- Step 8: Intercompany reconciliation exception detail --- */\ntitle1 "Intercompany Reconciliation Exceptions";\nproc print data=work.ic_all_exceptions noobs;\n    var entity_from entity_to account_id balance_from balance_to\n        net_difference netting_status;\n    where exception_flag = 'Y';\n    sum net_difference;\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* --- Cleanup temporary work datasets --- */\nproc datasets lib=work nolist nowarn;\n    delete gl_raw gl_cash_sorted bank_stmt_sorted\n           bank_exceptions_bank_temp\n           _ic_pair_: _ic_net_:;\nquit;\n\n/* --- Reset options to defaults --- */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n%put NOTE: RECONCILIATION COMPLETE;\n%put NOTE: Period: &recon_period;\n%put NOTE: Total Exceptions: &total_exceptions;\n%put NOTE: Return Code: &recon_rc;\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n-gold_meta24]
