blocked_count\n            / calculated total_transactions * 100\n            as block_rate format=8.4,\n        calculated rule_hit_count\n            / calculated total_transactions * 100\n            as rule_hit_rate format=8.4\n    from work.txn_scored\n    group by calculated txn_date\n    order by calculated txn_date;\nquit;\n\n/* Rule effectiveness analysis: hits and true blocks per rule */\nproc sql;\n    create table work.rule_effectiveness as\n    select 'Rule_01_High_Value'       as rule_name length=30,\n           sum(rule_hit_1)            as hits,\n           sum(rule_hit_1 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK')) as true_blocks\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_02_Rapid_Velocity',\n           sum(rule_hit_2),\n           sum(rule_hit_2 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_03_Amount_Deviation',\n           sum(rule_hit_3),\n           sum(rule_hit_3 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_04_Off_Hours',\n           sum(rule_hit_4),\n           sum(rule_hit_4 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_05_New_Account',\n           sum(rule_hit_5),\n           sum(rule_hit_5 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_06_Merchant_Repeat',\n           sum(rule_hit_6),\n           sum(rule_hit_6 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_07_Cross_Border',\n           sum(rule_hit_7),\n           sum(rule_hit_7 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_08_Round_Amount',\n           sum(rule_hit_8),\n           sum(rule_hit_8 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_09_BSA_Threshold',\n           sum(rule_hit_9),\n           sum(rule_hit_9 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_10_Spend_Anomaly',\n           sum(rule_hit_10),\n           sum(rule_hit_10 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_11_72h_Velocity',\n           sum(rule_hit_11),\n           sum(rule_hit_11 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored\n    union all\n    select 'Rule_12_HighRisk_Cust',\n           sum(rule_hit_12),\n           sum(rule_hit_12 * (alert_action = 'BLOCK'))\n    from work.txn_scored;\nquit;\n\n/* Score distribution report */\nproc means data=work.txn_scored\n           n mean std min p25 median p75 p90 p95 p99 max;\n    var blended_score model_score rule_score\n        transaction_amount fraud_probability;\n    title 'Fraud Detection - Score Distribution Summary';\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 8: Error Handling and Completion                                   */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%fraud_exit:\n\n%if &fraud_rc ne 0 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: ==================================================;\n    %put ERROR: Fraud Detection Pipeline FAILED;\n    %put ERROR: Return Code: &fraud_rc;\n    %put ERROR: Run ID:      &run_id;\n    %put ERROR: ==================================================;\n\n    /* Write error log record to alert library */\n    data alert.pipeline_errors;\n        length run_id $40 error_step $30 error_code 8\n               error_message $200;\n        run_id        = "&run_id";\n        error_step    = "STEP_&fraud_rc";\n        error_code    = &fraud_rc;\n        error_message = "Pipeline failed at step &fraud_rc - syserr=&syserr";\n        error_datetime = datetime();\n        format error_datetime datetime20.;\n    run;\n%end;\n\n%else %do;\n    %put NOTE: ==================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Fraud Detection Pipeline COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY;\n    %put NOTE: Run ID:        &run_id;\n    %put NOTE: Process Date:  &process_date;\n    %put NOTE: Blocked:       &block_count transactions;\n    %put NOTE: Review:        &review_count transactions;\n    %put NOTE: Passed:        &pass_count transactions;\n    %put NOTE: Total Alerts:  &total_alerts;\n    %put NOTE: ==================================================;\n\n    /* Write completion flag file for downstream batch scheduler */\n    data _null_;\n        file '/fraud/output/alerts/completion_flag.txt';\n        put "RUN_ID=&run_id";\n        put "STATUS=SUCCESS";\n        put "PROCESS_DATE=&process_date";\n        put "BLOCK_COUNT=&block_count";\n        put "REVIEW_COUNT=&review_count";\n        put "PASS_COUNT=&pass_count";\n        put "COMPLETION_TIME=" datetime() datetime20.;\n    run;\n%end;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 9: Cleanup                                                        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* Delete intermediate work datasets */\nproc datasets lib=work nolist;\n    delete _txn_sorted _hist_sorted _txn_combined\n           txn_featured txn_ruled txn_scored\n           passed_transactions rule_effectiveness;\nquit;\n\n/* Reset OPTIONS to defaults */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n\n%put NOTE: ===== Fraud Detection Pipeline Ended =====;\n%put NOTE: Timestamp: %sysfunc(datetime(), datetime20.);\n-gold_meta19]
[FAIL] test_no_def_main_in_deterministic[gsh_06_regulatory_report.sas-/******************************************************************************\n * Program Name : gsh_06_regulatory_report.sas\n * Author       : Capital Markets Risk & Compliance Division\n * Department   : Regulatory Reporting \u2014 Prudential Analytics\n * Version      : 3.1\n * Created      : 2025-01-15\n * Modified     : 2026-02-19\n * Purpose      : Multi-section regulatory filing report generator for\n *                CCAR (Comprehensive Capital Analysis and Review) and\n *                Basel III capital adequacy submissions. Computes\n *                risk-weighted assets (RWA) under Standardized and IRB\n *                approaches, derives CET1/Tier1/Total capital ratios,\n *                runs multi-quarter stress testing projections, and\n *                generates regulatory filing schedules (HC-R, FR Y-14).\n * Input        : risk.exposures, risk.pd_lgd_models, risk.collateral,\n *                fin.capital_components, fin.balance_sheet,\n *                comp.regulatory_limits, comp.buffer_requirements\n * Output       : out.rwa_summary, out.capital_ratios, out.stress_results,\n *                out.schedule_*, out.filing_cover_page\n * Dependencies : regulatory_formats.sas (format library for filing codes)\n * Reg Refs     : Basel III CRR Art. 92, CCAR FR Y-14A, Dodd-Frank \xa7165\n * Filing Period: Quarterly (current quarter derived from process date)\n * Change Log   :\n *   2025-01-15  v1.0  Initial RWA calculation framework         (A. Chen)\n *   2025-04-01  v1.5  Added IRB approach with PD/LGD/EAD       (R. Patel)\n *   2025-06-20  v2.0  Capital ratios and buffer calculations    (A. Chen)\n *   2025-09-10  v2.5  Stress testing module (3 scenarios)       (J. Novak)\n *   2025-11-28  v3.0  Schedule generation and ODS output        (R. Patel)\n *   2026-02-19  v3.1  Error handling, cover page, validation    (A. Chen)\n ******************************************************************************/\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 1: Environment Setup and Library Definitions                      */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\noptions mprint symbolgen mlogic nocenter ls=160 ps=60\n        validvarname=v7 nofmterr msglevel=i;\n\n/* --- Risk data library: exposures, PD/LGD models, collateral --- */\nlibname risk '/regulatory/data/risk'\n             access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Finance library: capital components and balance sheet --- */\nlibname fin '/regulatory/data/finance'\n            access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Compliance library: regulatory limits and buffer requirements --- */\nlibname comp '/regulatory/data/compliance'\n             access=readonly;\n\n/* --- Output library: filing schedules and summary reports --- */\nlibname out '/regulatory/output/filing';\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 2: Global Parameters and Reporting Period                         */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* --- Reporting period parameters --- */\n%let report_date    = %sysfunc(today(), date9.);\n%let report_qtr     = %sysfunc(today(), yyq6.);\n%let filing_year    = %sysfunc(year(%sysfunc(today())));\n%let filing_quarter = %sysfunc(qtr(%sysfunc(today())));\n%let run_id         = REG_%sysfunc(today(), yymmddn8.)_%sysfunc(time(), time5.);\n%let reg_rc         = 0;\n\n/* --- Regulatory minimum thresholds (Basel III) --- */\n%let min_cet1_ratio  = 0.045;\n%let min_tier1_ratio = 0.060;\n%let min_total_ratio = 0.080;\n%let ccb_rate        = 0.025;\n%let gsib_rate       = 0.010;\n\n/* --- Stress testing parameters --- */\n%let n_quarters      = 9;\n%let base_loss_rate  = 0.005;\n%let adv_loss_rate   = 0.025;\n%let sev_loss_rate   = 0.055;\n\n/* --- Schedule identifiers for filing --- */\n%let n_schedules     = 6;\n%let sched_id_1      = HC-R_PART1;\n%let sched_id_2      = HC-R_PART2;\n%let sched_id_3      = FR_Y14A_SUMM;\n%let sched_id_4      = FR_Y14A_LOSS;\n%let sched_id_5      = FR_Y14A_PPNR;\n%let sched_id_6      = FR_Y14Q_SUPP;\n\n/* Load regulatory format library for filing codes */\n%include '/regulatory/macros/regulatory_formats.sas';\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 3: %MACRO calc_rwa \u2014 Risk-Weighted Assets Calculation             */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO calc_rwa\n  Purpose: Calculate risk-weighted assets for a given asset class using\n           either the Standardized approach (fixed regulatory risk\n           weights) or the Internal Ratings-Based (IRB) approach with\n           PD/LGD/EAD model outputs. Aggregates exposure-level RWA\n           into portfolio-level summaries.\n  Parameters:\n    asset_class= : Asset class identifier (CORPORATE, SOVEREIGN,\n                   RETAIL, EQUITY)\n    approach=    : Calculation approach (STANDARDIZED or IRB)\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro calc_rwa(asset_class=, approach=);\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- calc_rwa: asset_class=&asset_class approach=&approach ----;\n\n    /* ----- Standardized Approach: Fixed Risk Weights ----- */\n    %if &approach = STANDARDIZED %then %do;\n\n        /* Apply Basel III standardized risk weights by rating band */\n        data work.rwa_&asset_class._std;\n            set risk.exposures(where=(asset_class = "&asset_class"));\n\n            /* Assign risk weight based on external credit rating */\n            select (rating_band);\n                when ('AAA','AA')  risk_weight = 0.20;\n                when ('A')         risk_weight = 0.50;\n                when ('BBB')       risk_weight = 1.00;\n                when ('BB')        risk_weight = 1.00;\n                when ('B')         risk_weight = 1.50;\n                when ('CCC','D')   risk_weight = 1.50;\n                otherwise          risk_weight = 1.00;  /* unrated */\n            end;\n\n            /* Sovereign exposures get preferential treatment */\n            if "&asset_class" = "SOVEREIGN" and domestic_flag = 'Y' then\n                risk_weight = 0.00;\n\n            /* Apply credit risk mitigation (CRM) adjustments */\n            if collateral_value > 0 then do;\n                crm_factor = min(collateral_value / exposure_amount, 1.0);\n                adjusted_exposure = exposure_amount * (1 - crm_factor * 0.80);\n            end;\n            else do;\n                crm_factor = 0;\n                adjusted_exposure = exposure_amount;\n            end;\n\n            /* Calculate risk-weighted asset amount */\n            rwa_amount       = adjusted_exposure * risk_weight;\n            calculation_date = "&report_date"d;\n            calc_approach    = 'STANDARDIZED';\n            calc_asset_class = "&asset_class";\n        run;\n\n    %end;\n\n    /* ----- IRB Approach: PD/LGD/EAD Model-Based ----- */\n    %else %do;\n\n        /* Retrieve PD/LGD/EAD model parameters for this asset class */\n        data work.rwa_&asset_class._irb;\n            merge risk.exposures(where=(asset_class = "&asset_class")\n                                 in=a)\n                  risk.pd_lgd_models(where=(model_asset_class = "&asset_class")\n                                     in=b);\n            by counterparty_id;\n            if a;\n\n            /* Default probability of default if model missing */\n            if pd_estimate = . then pd_estimate = 0.03;\n            if lgd_estimate = . then lgd_estimate = 0.45;\n\n            /* Effective maturity adjustment (Basel formula) */\n            maturity_adj = (1 + (effective_maturity - 2.5) * 0.05);\n            if maturity_adj < 0.70 then maturity_adj = 0.70;\n            if maturity_adj > 1.50 then maturity_adj = 1.50;\n\n            /* Asset correlation factor (R) per Basel III */\n            r_factor = 0.12 * (1 - exp(-50 * pd_estimate)) /\n                       (1 - exp(-50))\n                     + 0.24 * (1 - (1 - exp(-50 * pd_estimate)) /\n                       (1 - exp(-50)));\n\n            /* Capital requirement (K) \u2014 Basel IRB formula */\n            /* K = LGD * [N((1-R)^(-0.5) * G(PD) + (R/(1-R))^0.5 * G(0.999)) - PD] * MA */\n            /* Simplified computation using approximation */\n            norm_pd        = probit(pd_estimate);\n            norm_999       = probit(0.999);\n            adjusted_norm  = (norm_pd + sqrt(r_factor) * norm_999) /\n                             sqrt(1 - r_factor);\n            capital_req    = lgd_estimate *\n                             (probnorm(adjusted_norm) - pd_estimate) *\n                             maturity_adj;\n            if capital_req < 0 then capital_req = 0;\n\n            /* EAD calculation with credit conversion factors */\n            if ead_estimate > 0 then\n                effective_ead = ead_estimate;\n            else\n                effective_ead = exposure_amount * 1.0;  /* on-balance-sheet CCF */\n\n            /* Risk-weighted asset = 12.5 * K * EAD */\n            rwa_amount       = 12.5 * capital_req * effective_ead;\n            calculation_date = "&report_date"d;\n            calc_approach    = 'IRB';\n            calc_asset_class = "&asset_class";\n        run;\n\n    %end;\n\n    /* ----- Common: Portfolio-level RWA aggregation ----- */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        create table work.rwa_&asset_class._summary as\n        select\n            calc_asset_class as asset_class,\n            calc_approach    as approach,\n            count(*)                       as n_exposures,\n            sum(exposure_amount)           as total_exposure\n                format=comma20.2,\n            sum(rwa_amount)                as total_rwa\n                format=comma20.2,\n            mean(rwa_amount/exposure_amount) as avg_risk_weight\n                format=percent8.2,\n            calculation_date\n        from work.rwa_&asset_class._&substr(&approach, 1, 3)\n        group by calc_asset_class, calc_approach, calculation_date;\n\n        /* Capture total RWA for this asset class into macro variable */\n        select sum(rwa_amount) into :rwa_&asset_class._total trimmed\n        from work.rwa_&asset_class._&substr(&approach, 1, 3);\n    quit;\n\n    %put NOTE: RWA for &asset_class (&approach) = &&rwa_&asset_class._total;\n\n%mend calc_rwa;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 4: %MACRO capital_ratios \u2014 Capital Adequacy Ratios                */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO capital_ratios\n  Purpose: Compute CET1, Tier 1, and Total Capital ratios against\n           total risk-weighted assets. Compare to regulatory minimums\n           and calculate capital conservation buffer (CCB) and G-SIB\n           surcharge. Flags breaches against regulatory thresholds.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro capital_ratios;\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- capital_ratios: Computing regulatory capital ratios ----;\n\n    /* Step 1: Aggregate capital components from finance library */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        /* CET1 Capital = Common equity - regulatory deductions */\n        select sum(case when component_type = 'CET1_POSITIVE' then amount\n                        when component_type = 'CET1_DEDUCTION' then -amount\n                        else 0 end)\n            into :cet1_capital trimmed\n        from fin.capital_components\n        where reporting_date = "&report_date"d;\n\n        /* Additional Tier 1 Capital */\n        select sum(case when component_type = 'AT1_INSTRUMENT' then amount\n                        when component_type = 'AT1_DEDUCTION' then -amount\n                        else 0 end)\n            into :at1_capital trimmed\n        from fin.capital_components\n        where reporting_date = "&report_date"d;\n\n        /* Tier 2 Capital */\n        select sum(case when component_type = 'T2_INSTRUMENT' then amount\n                        when component_type = 'T2_DEDUCTION' then -amount\n                        else 0 end)\n            into :t2_capital trimmed\n        from fin.capital_components\n        where reporting_date = "&report_date"d;\n\n        /* Total RWA across all asset classes */\n        select sum(total_rwa) into :total_rwa trimmed\n        from (select total_rwa from work.rwa_corporate_summary\n              union all\n              select total_rwa from work.rwa_sovereign_summary\n              union all\n              select total_rwa from work.rwa_retail_summary\n              union all\n              select total_rwa from work.rwa_equity_summary);\n    quit;\n\n    /* Step 2: Compute ratios and compare to minimums */\n    data out.capital_ratios;\n        length ratio_name $30 ratio_value 8 regulatory_min 8\n               buffer_amount 8 surplus_deficit 8 breach_flag $1;\n\n        /* Derived capital levels */\n        cet1_cap    = &cet1_capital;\n        tier1_cap   = &cet1_capital + &at1_capital;\n        total_cap   = &cet1_capital + &at1_capital + &t2_capital;\n        total_rwa   = &total_rwa;\n        report_date = "&report_date"d;\n        format report_date date9.;\n\n        /* --- CET1 Ratio --- */\n        ratio_name     = 'CET1 Capital Ratio';\n        ratio_value    = cet1_cap / total_rwa;\n        regulatory_min = &min_cet1_ratio;\n        surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n        breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n        buffer_amount  = 0;\n        output;\n\n        /* --- Tier 1 Ratio --- */\n        ratio_name     = 'Tier 1 Capital Ratio';\n        ratio_value    = tier1_cap / total_rwa;\n        regulatory_min = &min_tier1_ratio;\n        surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n        breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n        buffer_amount  = 0;\n        output;\n\n        /* --- Total Capital Ratio --- */\n        ratio_name     = 'Total Capital Ratio';\n        ratio_value    = total_cap / total_rwa;\n        regulatory_min = &min_total_ratio;\n        surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n        breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n        buffer_amount  = 0;\n        output;\n\n        /* --- Capital Conservation Buffer (CCB) --- */\n        %if &ccb_rate > 0 %then %do;\n            ratio_name     = 'CET1 + CCB Ratio';\n            ratio_value    = cet1_cap / total_rwa;\n            regulatory_min = &min_cet1_ratio + &ccb_rate;\n            surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n            breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n            buffer_amount  = &ccb_rate * total_rwa;\n            output;\n        %end;\n\n        /* --- G-SIB Surcharge --- */\n        %if &gsib_rate > 0 %then %do;\n            ratio_name     = 'CET1 + CCB + G-SIB';\n            ratio_value    = cet1_cap / total_rwa;\n            regulatory_min = &min_cet1_ratio + &ccb_rate + &gsib_rate;\n            surplus_deficit = ratio_value - regulatory_min;\n            breach_flag    = ifc(ratio_value < regulatory_min, 'Y', 'N');\n            buffer_amount  = (&ccb_rate + &gsib_rate) * total_rwa;\n            output;\n        %end;\n\n        drop cet1_cap tier1_cap total_cap total_rwa;\n    run;\n\n    /* Store key ratios as macro variables for downstream use */\n    data _null_;\n        set out.capital_ratios;\n        if ratio_name = 'CET1 Capital Ratio' then\n            call symputx('cet1_ratio', put(ratio_value, 8.4));\n        if ratio_name = 'Tier 1 Capital Ratio' then\n            call symputx('tier1_ratio', put(ratio_value, 8.4));\n        if ratio_name = 'Total Capital Ratio' then\n            call symputx('total_ratio', put(ratio_value, 8.4));\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: CET1 Ratio  = &cet1_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Tier1 Ratio  = &tier1_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Total Ratio  = &total_ratio;\n\n%mend capital_ratios;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 5: %MACRO stress_testing \u2014 Stress Scenario Analysis               */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO stress_testing\n  Purpose: Project losses and capital impacts over 9 quarters under\n           a given macroeconomic stress scenario. Uses arrays for\n           multi-period loss projection, scenario-specific loss rates,\n           and PROC MEANS for summary statistics.\n  Parameters:\n    scenario= : Stress scenario name (BASE, ADVERSE, SEVERELY_ADVERSE)\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro stress_testing(scenario=);\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- stress_testing: scenario=&scenario ----;\n\n    /* Determine scenario-specific loss rate multiplier */\n    %if &scenario = BASE %then %do;\n        %let loss_rate = &base_loss_rate;\n        %let gdp_shock = -0.005;\n        %let unemp_delta = 0.002;\n    %end;\n    %else %if &scenario = ADVERSE %then %do;\n        %let loss_rate = &adv_loss_rate;\n        %let gdp_shock = -0.035;\n        %let unemp_delta = 0.025;\n    %end;\n    %else %if &scenario = SEVERELY_ADVERSE %then %do;\n        %let loss_rate = &sev_loss_rate;\n        %let gdp_shock = -0.080;\n        %let unemp_delta = 0.060;\n    %end;\n\n    /* Multi-quarter loss projection using arrays */\n    data work.stress_&scenario;\n        set work.rwa_corporate_summary(keep=total_exposure total_rwa)\n            work.rwa_retail_summary(keep=total_exposure total_rwa);\n\n        /* Quarter projection arrays */\n        array qtr_loss{&n_quarters}    qtr_loss_1 - qtr_loss_&n_quarters;\n        array qtr_capital{&n_quarters} qtr_cap_1  - qtr_cap_&n_quarters;\n        array qtr_rwa{&n_quarters}     qtr_rwa_1  - qtr_rwa_&n_quarters;\n        array cum_loss{&n_quarters}    cum_loss_1 - cum_loss_&n_quarters;\n\n        /* Scenario parameters */\n        scenario_name = "&scenario";\n        base_capital  = &cet1_capital;\n        annual_rate   = &loss_rate;\n\n        /* Project losses over each quarter with increasing severity */\n        %do q = 1 %to &n_quarters;\n            /* Loss rate increases in early quarters, stabilizes later */\n            %let q_weight = %sysevalf(&q / &n_quarters);\n            qtr_loss{&q} = total_exposure * annual_rate *\n                           (0.5 + &q_weight * 0.5) / 4;\n            if &q = 1 then\n                cum_loss{&q} = qtr_loss{&q};\n            else\n                cum_loss{&q} = cum_loss{%eval(&q - 1)} + qtr_loss{&q};\n\n            /* Capital after losses (simplified \u2014 no earnings offset) */\n            qtr_capital{&q} = base_capital - cum_loss{&q};\n\n            /* RWA migration under stress (assets deteriorate) */\n            qtr_rwa{&q} = total_rwa * (1 + &q_weight * 0.15);\n        %end;\n\n        /* Minimum capital ratio across projection horizon */\n        min_capital = min(of qtr_cap_1 - qtr_cap_&n_quarters);\n        min_ratio   = min_capital / max(of qtr_rwa_1 - qtr_rwa_&n_quarters);\n        gdp_impact  = &gdp_shock;\n        unemp_impact = &unemp_delta;\n\n        format total_exposure total_rwa base_capital min_capital\n               qtr_loss_1-qtr_loss_&n_quarters\n               qtr_cap_1-qtr_cap_&n_quarters\n               cum_loss_1-cum_loss_&n_quarters\n               comma20.2;\n        format min_ratio percent8.2;\n    run;\n\n    /* Summary statistics for the stress scenario */\n    proc means data=work.stress_&scenario\n               n mean std min max sum maxdec=2;\n        var qtr_loss_1-qtr_loss_&n_quarters\n            qtr_cap_1-qtr_cap_&n_quarters\n            cum_loss_1-cum_loss_&n_quarters;\n        title "Stress Testing \u2014 &scenario Scenario: Quarterly Projections";\n        title2 "Filing Period: &report_qtr | Run ID: &run_id";\n    run;\n    title;\n\n    /* Append scenario results to consolidated output */\n    proc append base=out.stress_results\n                data=work.stress_&scenario force;\n    run;\n\n    %put NOTE: Stress testing complete for &scenario scenario.;\n    %put NOTE: Minimum projected CET1 ratio = %sysfunc(putn(\n               %sysevalf(&cet1_capital * 0.85), comma20.2));\n\n%mend stress_testing;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 6: %MACRO generate_schedules \u2014 Regulatory Filing Schedules        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/*----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  %MACRO generate_schedules\n  Purpose: Generate individual regulatory filing schedules for the\n           current reporting period. Iterates over schedule IDs,\n           applies schedule-specific formatting and data aggregation\n           rules, and produces ODS output for each schedule.\n----------------------------------------------------------------------*/\n\n%macro generate_schedules;\n\n    %put NOTE: ---- generate_schedules: Creating &n_schedules schedules ----;\n\n    /* Loop through each schedule identifier */\n    %do s = 1 %to &n_schedules;\n\n        %let current_sched = &&sched_id_&s;\n        %put NOTE: Processing schedule &s of &n_schedules: &current_sched;\n\n        /* Schedule-specific data aggregation */\n        %if &current_sched = HC-R_PART1 %then %do;\n            /* HC-R Part 1: Regulatory Capital Components */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_hcr_p1 as\n                select\n                    component_type,\n                    component_name,\n                    sum(amount) as reported_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period,\n                    "&report_date"d as as_of_date format=date9.\n                from fin.capital_components\n                where reporting_date = "&report_date"d\n                group by component_type, component_name\n                order by component_type, component_name;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = HC-R_PART2 %then %do;\n            /* HC-R Part 2: Risk-Weighted Assets by Category */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_hcr_p2 as\n                select\n                    asset_class,\n                    approach,\n                    n_exposures,\n                    total_exposure format=comma20.2,\n                    total_rwa      format=comma20.2,\n                    avg_risk_weight format=percent8.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period,\n                    "&report_date"d as as_of_date format=date9.\n                from (select * from work.rwa_corporate_summary\n                      union all\n                      select * from work.rwa_sovereign_summary\n                      union all\n                      select * from work.rwa_retail_summary\n                      union all\n                      select * from work.rwa_equity_summary)\n                order by asset_class;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14A_SUMM %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14A Summary: Capital ratios and buffers */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14a_summ as\n                select\n                    ratio_name,\n                    ratio_value    format=percent8.4,\n                    regulatory_min format=percent8.4,\n                    surplus_deficit format=percent8.4,\n                    breach_flag,\n                    buffer_amount  format=comma20.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period\n                from out.capital_ratios\n                order by ratio_name;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14A_LOSS %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14A Loss Projections: Stress test loss outputs */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14a_loss as\n                select\n                    scenario_name,\n                    sum(qtr_loss_1) as q1_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(qtr_loss_2) as q2_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(qtr_loss_3) as q3_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(cum_loss_9) as total_cum_loss format=comma20.2,\n                    min(min_ratio)  as worst_ratio format=percent8.4,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period\n                from out.stress_results\n                group by scenario_name\n                order by scenario_name;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14A_PPNR %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14A PPNR: Pre-Provision Net Revenue projections */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14a_ppnr as\n                select\n                    line_item,\n                    sum(case when quarter = 1 then amount else 0 end)\n                        as q1_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(case when quarter = 2 then amount else 0 end)\n                        as q2_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(case when quarter = 3 then amount else 0 end)\n                        as q3_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    sum(amount) as total_amount format=comma20.2,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period\n                from fin.balance_sheet\n                where fiscal_year = &filing_year\n                  and line_category = 'PPNR'\n                group by line_item\n                order by line_item;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        %else %if &current_sched = FR_Y14Q_SUPP %then %do;\n            /* FR Y-14Q Supplemental: Detailed exposure data */\n            proc sql;\n                create table out.schedule_y14q_supp as\n                select\n                    e.asset_class,\n                    e.counterparty_id,\n                    e.exposure_amount  format=comma20.2,\n                    e.rating_band,\n                    m.pd_estimate      format=8.6,\n                    m.lgd_estimate     format=8.4,\n                    c.collateral_value format=comma20.2,\n                    c.collateral_type,\n                    "&report_qtr" as filing_period,\n                    "&report_date"d as as_of_date format=date9.\n                from risk.exposures e\n                left join risk.pd_lgd_models m\n                    on e.counterparty_id = m.counterparty_id\n                   and e.asset_class = m.model_asset_class\n                left join risk.collateral c\n                    on e.counterparty_id = c.counterparty_id\n                order by e.asset_class, e.counterparty_id;\n            quit;\n        %end;\n\n        /* ODS output for each schedule */\n        ods pdf file="/regulatory/output/filing/&current_sched._&filing_year.Q&filing_quarter..pdf";\n        proc print data=out.schedule_%sysfunc(translate(&current_sched, '_', '-'))\n                   noobs label;\n            title "Regulatory Filing Schedule: &current_sched";\n            title2 "Reporting Period: &report_qtr | As of &report_date";\n            title3 "Institution: Sample Bank, N.A. | RSSD ID: 1234567";\n        run;\n        ods pdf close;\n\n        %put NOTE: Schedule &current_sched generated successfully.;\n\n    %end;\n\n    title;\n    %put NOTE: All &n_schedules regulatory schedules generated.;\n\n%mend generate_schedules;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 7: Main Program \u2014 Orchestrate Full Regulatory Filing              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%put NOTE: ================================================================;\n%put NOTE: REGULATORY FILING PIPELINE \u2014 START;\n%put NOTE: Run ID: &run_id;\n%put NOTE: Report Date: &report_date;\n%put NOTE: Filing Period: &filing_year Q&filing_quarter;\n%put NOTE: ================================================================;\n\n/* ----- Step 1: Calculate RWA for each asset class ----- */\n%put NOTE: --- Step 1: Risk-Weighted Assets Calculation ---;\n\n%calc_rwa(asset_class=CORPORATE, approach=IRB);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 1;\n    %put ERROR: RWA calculation failed for CORPORATE.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%calc_rwa(asset_class=SOVEREIGN, approach=STANDARDIZED);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 2;\n    %put ERROR: RWA calculation failed for SOVEREIGN.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%calc_rwa(asset_class=RETAIL, approach=IRB);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 3;\n    %put ERROR: RWA calculation failed for RETAIL.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%calc_rwa(asset_class=EQUITY, approach=STANDARDIZED);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 4;\n    %put ERROR: RWA calculation failed for EQUITY.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n/* Consolidate RWA results across all asset classes */\nproc sql;\n    create table out.rwa_summary as\n    select * from work.rwa_corporate_summary\n    union all\n    select * from work.rwa_sovereign_summary\n    union all\n    select * from work.rwa_retail_summary\n    union all\n    select * from work.rwa_equity_summary\n    order by asset_class;\nquit;\n\n%put NOTE: Step 1 complete \u2014 RWA calculated for all 4 asset classes.;\n\n/* ----- Step 2: Calculate Capital Ratios ----- */\n%put NOTE: --- Step 2: Capital Adequacy Ratios ---;\n\n%capital_ratios;\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 5;\n    %put ERROR: Capital ratio calculation failed.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%put NOTE: Step 2 complete \u2014 Capital ratios derived.;\n\n/* ----- Step 3: Run Stress Testing Scenarios ----- */\n%put NOTE: --- Step 3: Stress Testing Projections ---;\n\n/* Clear any prior stress results */\nproc datasets lib=out nolist;\n    delete stress_results;\nrun; quit;\n\n%stress_testing(scenario=BASE);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 6;\n    %put ERROR: Stress testing failed for BASE scenario.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%stress_testing(scenario=ADVERSE);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 7;\n    %put ERROR: Stress testing failed for ADVERSE scenario.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%stress_testing(scenario=SEVERELY_ADVERSE);\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 8;\n    %put ERROR: Stress testing failed for SEVERELY_ADVERSE scenario.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%put NOTE: Step 3 complete \u2014 All 3 stress scenarios projected.;\n\n/* ----- Step 4: Generate Filing Schedules ----- */\n%put NOTE: --- Step 4: Filing Schedule Generation ---;\n\n%generate_schedules;\n\n%if &syserr > 0 %then %do;\n    %let reg_rc = 9;\n    %put ERROR: Schedule generation failed.;\n    %goto reg_exit;\n%end;\n\n%put NOTE: Step 4 complete \u2014 All schedules generated.;\n\n/* ----- Step 5: Cover Page Summary ----- */\n%put NOTE: --- Step 5: Cover Page and Validation ---;\n\nproc sql;\n    create table out.filing_cover_page as\n    select\n        "&run_id"                            as run_id,\n        "&filing_year Q&filing_quarter"      as filing_period,\n        "&report_date"d                      as report_date format=date9.,\n        &total_rwa                           as total_rwa format=comma20.2,\n        input("&cet1_ratio", best8.)         as cet1_ratio format=percent8.4,\n        input("&tier1_ratio", best8.)        as tier1_ratio format=percent8.4,\n        input("&total_ratio", best8.)        as total_ratio format=percent8.4,\n        (select count(*) from out.rwa_summary) as n_exposures,\n        &n_schedules                         as schedules_filed,\n        datetime()                           as filing_timestamp\n            format=datetime20.,\n        'PENDING_REVIEW'                     as filing_status length=20\n    from fin.balance_sheet(obs=1);  /* single-row driver table */\nquit;\n\n/* ----- Step 6: Validation Reports ----- */\n\n/* Print capital ratio validation */\nproc print data=out.capital_ratios noobs label;\n    title 'Regulatory Filing Validation: Capital Adequacy Ratios';\n    title2 "Filing Period: &filing_year Q&filing_quarter";\n    var ratio_name ratio_value regulatory_min surplus_deficit breach_flag;\n    format ratio_value regulatory_min surplus_deficit percent8.4;\nrun;\n\n/* Print RWA validation by asset class */\nproc print data=out.rwa_summary noobs label;\n    title 'Regulatory Filing Validation: RWA by Asset Class';\n    title2 "Filing Period: &filing_year Q&filing_quarter";\n    var asset_class approach n_exposures total_exposure total_rwa\n        avg_risk_weight;\nrun;\n\n/* Print stress testing worst-case ratios */\nproc print data=out.stress_results noobs label;\n    title 'Regulatory Filing Validation: Stress Test Projections';\n    title2 "Filing Period: &filing_year Q&filing_quarter";\n    var scenario_name total_exposure base_capital min_capital min_ratio\n        gdp_impact unemp_impact;\n    format min_ratio percent8.4 gdp_impact unemp_impact percent6.2;\nrun;\ntitle;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 8: Error Handling and Completion                                   */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%reg_exit:\n\n%if &reg_rc ne 0 %then %do;\n    %put ERROR: ============================================================;\n    %put ERROR: REGULATORY FILING PIPELINE FAILED;\n    %put ERROR: Return code = &reg_rc;\n    %put ERROR: Run ID = &run_id;\n    %put ERROR: ============================================================;\n\n    /* Log error details for audit trail */\n    data out.filing_errors;\n        length run_id $40 error_step $60 error_code 8\n               error_message $200 error_datetime 8;\n        run_id         = "&run_id";\n        error_step     = "Step failed at reg_rc=&reg_rc";\n        error_code     = &reg_rc;\n        error_message  = "Pipeline terminated \u2014 check SAS log for details.";\n        error_datetime = datetime();\n        format error_datetime datetime20.;\n    run;\n%end;\n\n%else %do;\n    %put NOTE: ============================================================;\n    %put NOTE: REGULATORY FILING PIPELINE COMPLETE;\n    %put NOTE: Run ID        : &run_id;\n    %put NOTE: Report Date   : &report_date;\n    %put NOTE: Filing Period  : &filing_year Q&filing_quarter;\n    %put NOTE: CET1 Ratio    : &cet1_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Tier1 Ratio   : &tier1_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Total Ratio   : &total_ratio;\n    %put NOTE: Schedules Filed: &n_schedules;\n    %put NOTE: ============================================================;\n\n    /* Write completion flag for downstream systems */\n    data _null_;\n        file '/regulatory/output/filing/completion_flag.txt';\n        put "RUN_ID=&run_id";\n        put "STATUS=SUCCESS";\n        put "FILING_PERIOD=&filing_year.Q&filing_quarter";\n        put "CET1_RATIO=&cet1_ratio";\n        put "TIER1_RATIO=&tier1_ratio";\n        put "TOTAL_RATIO=&total_ratio";\n        put "SCHEDULES_FILED=&n_schedules";\n        put "COMPLETION_TIME=" datetime() datetime20.;\n    run;\n%end;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 9: Cleanup                                                        */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* Delete intermediate work datasets */\nproc datasets lib=work nolist;\n    delete rwa_corporate_std rwa_corporate_irb rwa_corporate_summary\n           rwa_sovereign_std rwa_sovereign_irb rwa_sovereign_summary\n           rwa_retail_std rwa_retail_irb rwa_retail_summary\n           rwa_equity_std rwa_equity_irb rwa_equity_summary\n           stress_base stress_adverse stress_severely_adverse;\nrun; quit;\n\n/* Reset options to defaults */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n\n%put NOTE: Regulatory filing pipeline ended at %sysfunc(datetime(), datetime20.);\n%put NOTE: Final return code = &reg_rc;\n-gold_meta20]

[SKIP] test_no_def_main_in_deterministic[gsh_07_migration_suite.sas-/******************************************************************************\n * Program Name : gsh_07_migration_suite.sas\n * Author       : Data Migration Team \u2014 Enterprise Systems Division\n * Created      : 2026-01-20\n * Modified     : 2026-02-19\n * Purpose      : Data migration validation suite for legacy-to-new-platform\n *                migration. Performs count reconciliation, column-level\n *                comparison, amount tolerance checking, referential integrity\n *                validation, and generates a comprehensive reconciliation\n *                report with overall migration quality score.\n * Migration    : Phase 3 \u2014 Data Validation & Reconciliation\n * Dependencies : migration_utilities.sas\n * Frequency    : On-demand during migration windows\n * Change Log   :\n *   2026-01-20  v1.0  Initial development                    (R. Torres)\n *   2026-02-05  v1.1  Added column-level comparison macro     (L. Nguyen)\n *   2026-02-12  v1.2  Enhanced tolerance logic and reporting  (R. Torres)\n *   2026-02-19  v1.3  Added referential integrity checks      (M. Khan)\n ******************************************************************************/\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 1: Environment Setup \u2014 Libraries, Options, Parameters             */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\noptions mprint mlogic symbolgen nocenter ls=200 ps=65\n        validvarname=v7 nofmterr;\n\n/* --- Library references for migration layers --- */\nlibname legacy   '/data/migration/legacy'    access=readonly;\nlibname target   '/data/migration/target';\nlibname reconcil '/data/migration/reconcile';\nlibname work     '%sysfunc(pathname(work))';\n\n/* --- Global migration parameters --- */\n%let batch_id      = MIG-2026-0219-001;\n%let run_date      = %sysfunc(today(), yymmdd10.);\n%let run_timestamp = %sysfunc(datetime(), datetime20.);\n%let tolerance     = 0.01;\n%let tol_type      = PCT;    /* ABS = absolute, PCT = percentage */\n%let migration_rc  = 0;\n%let total_checks  = 0;\n%let passed_checks = 0;\n%let failed_checks = 0;\n%let n_tables      = 8;\n%let n_crit_tables = 4;\n%let n_fin_tables  = 3;\n%let n_fk_pairs    = 5;\n\n/* --- Table lists for batch processing --- */\n%let table1 = customers;\n%let table2 = accounts;\n%let table3 = transactions;\n%let table4 = products;\n%let table5 = orders;\n%let table6 = order_lines;\n%let table7 = suppliers;\n%let table8 = employees;\n\n/* Include shared migration utilities */\n%include '/migration/common/migration_utilities.sas';\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 2: Macro Definitions                                              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: count_reconcile                                                  */\n/*   Compares row counts between legacy source and migration target for    */\n/*   a given table. Logs pass/fail result to reconcil.count_results.       */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro count_reconcile(table=, lib_src=legacy, lib_tgt=target);\n    %local src_count tgt_count diff pct_diff status;\n\n    %put NOTE: ===== Count Reconciliation: &table =====;\n\n    /* Get row count from the legacy source system */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :src_count trimmed\n        from &lib_src..&table;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Get row count from the migration target system */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :tgt_count trimmed\n        from &lib_tgt..&table;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Compute difference and determine pass/fail status */\n    data reconcil.count_result_&table;\n        length table_name $32 status $10 batch_id $30 check_type $10\n               run_date $10;\n        table_name = "&table";\n        batch_id   = "&batch_id";\n        src_count  = &src_count;\n        tgt_count  = &tgt_count;\n        diff       = tgt_count - src_count;\n\n        /* Calculate percentage difference */\n        if src_count > 0 then\n            pct_diff = abs(diff) / src_count * 100;\n        else\n            pct_diff = 0;\n\n        /* Assess result: counts must match exactly */\n        if diff = 0 then do;\n            status = 'PASS';\n            call symputx('passed_checks',\n                         input(symget('passed_checks'), best.) + 1);\n        end;\n        else do;\n            status = 'FAIL';\n            call symputx('failed_checks',\n                         input(symget('failed_checks'), best.) + 1);\n        end;\n\n        check_type = 'COUNT';\n        run_date   = "&run_date";\n        output;\n    run;\n\n    /* Increment global counter */\n    %let total_checks = %eval(&total_checks + 1);\n\n    %put NOTE: &table \u2014 Source: &src_count | Target: &tgt_count | Diff: %eval(&tgt_count - &src_count);\n%mend count_reconcile;\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: column_compare                                                   */\n/*   Performs column-level comparison between legacy and target tables.     */\n/*   Joins on key columns and checks each compare column for value         */\n/*   mismatches. Identifies records missing in source, missing in target,  */\n/*   and individual column differences.                                    */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro column_compare(table=, key_cols=, compare_cols=, lib_src=legacy);\n    %local n_comp i col join_cond n_keys kcol n_mismatches;\n\n    %put NOTE: ===== Column Comparison: &table =====;\n\n    /* Count the number of columns to compare */\n    %let n_comp = %sysfunc(countw(&compare_cols, %str( )));\n    %let n_keys = %sysfunc(countw(&key_cols, %str( )));\n\n    /* Build the join condition dynamically from key columns */\n    %let join_cond = ;\n    %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n        %let kcol = %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( ));\n        %if &i > 1 %then %let join_cond = &join_cond AND;\n        %let join_cond = &join_cond s.&kcol = t.&kcol;\n    %end;\n\n    /* Full outer join of source and target on key columns */\n    proc sql;\n        create table work._compare_&table as\n        select\n            coalesce(s.%scan(&key_cols, 1, %str( )),\n                     t.%scan(&key_cols, 1, %str( ))) as key_value,\n            case\n                when s.%scan(&key_cols, 1, %str( )) is null\n                    then 'MISSING_IN_SOURCE'\n                when t.%scan(&key_cols, 1, %str( )) is null\n                    then 'MISSING_IN_TARGET'\n                else 'MATCHED'\n            end as match_status length=20,\n            /* Select source and target versions of each compare column */\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_comp;\n                %let col = %scan(&compare_cols, &i, %str( ));\n                s.&col as src_&col,\n                t.&col as tgt_&col\n                %if &i < &n_comp %then ,;\n            %end;\n        from &lib_src..&table s\n        full outer join target.&table t\n        on &join_cond;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Analyze each compare column for mismatches using arrays */\n    data reconcil.col_compare_&table(drop=i _mismatch_flag);\n        set work._compare_&table;\n\n        length column_name $32 mismatch_detail $200 table_name $32\n               batch_id $30 check_type $10 run_date $10;\n\n        /* Arrays for paired source/target column values */\n        array _src(*) src_:;\n        array _tgt(*) tgt_:;\n\n        table_name = "&table";\n        batch_id   = "&batch_id";\n        check_type = 'COLUMN';\n        run_date   = "&run_date";\n\n        /* Handle records missing from one system */\n        if match_status = 'MISSING_IN_SOURCE' then do;\n            column_name     = '_KEY_';\n            mismatch_detail = 'Record exists in target but not in source';\n            output;\n        end;\n        else if match_status = 'MISSING_IN_TARGET' then do;\n            column_name     = '_KEY_';\n            mismatch_detail = 'Record exists in source but not in target';\n            output;\n        end;\n        else do;\n            /* Row matched on keys \u2014 compare each column value */\n            _mismatch_flag = 0;\n            do i = 1 to dim(_src);\n                if _src(i) ne _tgt(i) then do;\n                    column_name = vname(_src(i));\n                    mismatch_detail = catx(' | ',\n                        'Source=' || strip(put(_src(i), best32.)),\n                        'Target=' || strip(put(_tgt(i), best32.)));\n                    _mismatch_flag = 1;\n                    output;\n                end;\n            end;\n\n            /* If no column mismatches, record a PASS entry */\n            if _mismatch_flag = 0 then do;\n                column_name     = '_ALL_';\n                mismatch_detail = 'All columns match';\n                output;\n            end;\n        end;\n    run;\n\n    /* Summarize mismatch count for this table */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :n_mismatches trimmed\n        from reconcil.col_compare_&table\n        where column_name ne '_ALL_'\n          and mismatch_detail not contains 'All columns match';\n    quit;\n\n    /* Update global check counters */\n    %let total_checks = %eval(&total_checks + 1);\n\n    %if &n_mismatches > 0 %then %do;\n        %put WARNING: &table \u2014 &n_mismatches column-level mismatches detected.;\n        %let failed_checks = %eval(&failed_checks + 1);\n    %end;\n    %else %do;\n        %put NOTE: &table \u2014 All compared columns match.;\n        %let passed_checks = %eval(&passed_checks + 1);\n    %end;\n%mend column_compare;\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: sum_reconcile                                                    */\n/*   Reconciles summed amounts between legacy and target systems by key    */\n/*   grouping. Supports absolute and percentage tolerance thresholds.      */\n/*   Results are logged with breach details per amount column.             */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro sum_reconcile(table=, key_cols=, amount_cols=, tolerance=&tolerance);\n    %local n_amt i acol join_cond n_keys kcol n_breaches;\n\n    %put NOTE: ===== Sum Reconciliation: &table =====;\n\n    %let n_amt  = %sysfunc(countw(&amount_cols, %str( )));\n    %let n_keys = %sysfunc(countw(&key_cols, %str( )));\n\n    /* Build join condition from key columns */\n    %let join_cond = ;\n    %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n        %let kcol = %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( ));\n        %if &i > 1 %then %let join_cond = &join_cond AND;\n        %let join_cond = &join_cond s.&kcol = t.&kcol;\n    %end;\n\n    /* Aggregate amounts by key from the legacy source */\n    proc sql;\n        create table work._sum_src_&table as\n        select\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n                %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( )),\n            %end;\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_amt;\n                %let acol = %scan(&amount_cols, &i, %str( ));\n                sum(&acol) as &acol format=comma20.2\n                %if &i < &n_amt %then ,;\n            %end;\n        from legacy.&table\n        group by\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n                %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( ))\n                %if &i < &n_keys %then ,;\n            %end;\n        ;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Aggregate amounts by key from the migration target */\n    proc sql;\n        create table work._sum_tgt_&table as\n        select\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n                %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( )),\n            %end;\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_amt;\n                %let acol = %scan(&amount_cols, &i, %str( ));\n                sum(&acol) as &acol format=comma20.2\n                %if &i < &n_amt %then ,;\n            %end;\n        from target.&table\n        group by\n            %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n                %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( ))\n                %if &i < &n_keys %then ,;\n            %end;\n        ;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Merge source and target summaries and compare amounts */\n    data reconcil.sum_result_&table;\n        merge work._sum_src_&table(rename=(\n                %do i = 1 %to &n_amt;\n                    %let acol = %scan(&amount_cols, &i, %str( ));\n                    &acol = src_&acol\n                %end;\n              ))\n              work._sum_tgt_&table(rename=(\n                %do i = 1 %to &n_amt;\n                    %let acol = %scan(&amount_cols, &i, %str( ));\n                    &acol = tgt_&acol\n                %end;\n              ));\n        by %do i = 1 %to &n_keys;\n               %scan(&key_cols, &i, %str( ))\n           %end;\n        ;\n\n        length status $10 breach_detail $200 table_name $32\n               batch_id $30 check_type $10 run_date $10;\n\n        table_name = "&table";\n        batch_id   = "&batch_id";\n        check_type = 'SUM';\n        run_date   = "&run_date";\n        tolerance  = &tolerance;\n\n        /* Compute difference for each amount column */\n        %do i = 1 %to &n_amt;\n            %let acol = %scan(&amount_cols, &i, %str( ));\n\n            diff_&acol = coalesce(tgt_&acol, 0)\n                       - coalesce(src_&acol, 0);\n\n            /* Apply tolerance check based on configured tolerance type */\n            %if &tol_type = PCT %then %do;\n                /* Percentage tolerance mode */\n                if coalesce(src_&acol, 0) ne 0 then\n                    pct_diff_&acol = abs(diff_&acol)\n                                   / abs(src_&acol) * 100;\n                else\n                    pct_diff_&acol = 0;\n\n                if pct_diff_&acol > &tolerance * 100 then do;\n                    status = 'FAIL';\n                    breach_detail = catx(' ',\n                        "&acol breach:",\n                        strip(put(pct_diff_&acol, 8.4)) || '%',\n                        '> threshold',\n                        strip(put(&tolerance * 100, 8.4)) || '%');\n                end;\n            %end;\n            %else %do;\n                /* Absolute tolerance mode */\n                if abs(diff_&acol) > &tolerance then do;\n                    status = 'FAIL';\n                    breach_detail = catx(' ',\n                        "&acol breach:",\n                        strip(put(abs(diff_&acol), comma20.2)),\n                        '> threshold',\n                        strip(put(&tolerance, comma20.2)));\n                end;\n            %end;\n        %end;\n\n        /* Default to PASS if no breach was flagged */\n        if status = ' ' then status = 'PASS';\n    run;\n\n    /* Count tolerance breaches */\n    proc sql noprint;\n        select count(*) into :n_breaches trimmed\n        from reconcil.sum_result_&table\n        where status = 'FAIL';\n    quit;\n\n    /* Update global counters */\n    %let total_checks = %eval(&total_checks + 1);\n\n    %if &n_breaches > 0 %then %do;\n        %put WARNING: &table \u2014 &n_breaches tolerance breaches found.;\n        %let failed_checks = %eval(&failed_checks + 1);\n    %end;\n    %else %do;\n        %put NOTE: &table \u2014 All amounts within tolerance (&tol_type=&tolerance).;\n        %let passed_checks = %eval(&passed_checks + 1);\n    %end;\n%mend sum_reconcile;\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: referential_integrity                                            */\n/*   Validates foreign key relationships by identifying orphaned records   */\n/*   in the target system where child FK values have no matching parent    */\n/*   record. Logs count and pass/fail status.                              */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro referential_integrity(parent_table=, child_table=, fk_col=);\n    %local n_orphans;\n\n    %put NOTE: ===== Referential Integrity: &child_table -> &parent_table (&fk_col) =====;\n\n    /* Identify orphaned child records with no matching parent */\n    proc sql;\n        create table reconcil.orphans_&child_table._&fk_col as\n        select c.*\n        from target.&child_table c\n        left join target.&parent_table p\n        on c.&fk_col = p.&fk_col\n        where p.&fk_col is null\n          and c.&fk_col is not null;\n\n        /* Capture orphan count into macro variable */\n        select count(*) into :n_orphans trimmed\n        from reconcil.orphans_&child_table._&fk_col;\n    quit;\n\n    /* Log referential integrity result */\n    data reconcil.fk_result_&child_table._&fk_col;\n        length parent_table $32 child_table $32 fk_column $32\n               status $10 batch_id $30 check_type $10 run_date $10;\n\n        parent_table = "&parent_table";\n        child_table  = "&child_table";\n        fk_column    = "&fk_col";\n        orphan_count = &n_orphans;\n        batch_id     = "&batch_id";\n        check_type   = 'FK';\n        run_date     = "&run_date";\n\n        if orphan_count = 0 then do;\n            status = 'PASS';\n            call symputx('passed_checks',\n                         input(symget('passed_checks'), best.) + 1);\n        end;\n        else do;\n            status = 'FAIL';\n            call symputx('failed_checks',\n                         input(symget('failed_checks'), best.) + 1);\n        end;\n    run;\n\n    /* Increment global check counter */\n    %let total_checks = %eval(&total_checks + 1);\n\n    %if &n_orphans > 0 %then\n        %put WARNING: &child_table.&fk_col \u2014 &n_orphans orphaned records found.;\n    %else\n        %put NOTE: &child_table.&fk_col \u2014 Referential integrity intact.;\n%mend referential_integrity;\n\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n/* MACRO: generate_reconciliation_report                                   */\n/*   Compiles all reconciliation results into a unified dashboard and      */\n/*   generates a formatted PDF report with overall migration quality       */\n/*   score, count details, and FK validation results.                      */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro generate_reconciliation_report;\n    %local i;\n\n    %put NOTE: ===== Generating Reconciliation Report =====;\n\n    /* --- Step 1: Merge all count reconciliation results --- */\n    data reconcil.all_count_results;\n        set\n        %do i = 1 %to &n_tables;\n            reconcil.count_result_&&table&i\n        %end;\n        ;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Step 2: Merge all FK validation results --- */\n    data reconcil.all_fk_results;\n        length parent_table $32 child_table $32 fk_column $32\n               status $10 batch_id $30 check_type $10 run_date $10;\n        set\n            reconcil.fk_result_orders_customer_id\n            reconcil.fk_result_order_lines_order_id\n            reconcil.fk_result_order_lines_product_id\n            reconcil.fk_result_transactions_account_id\n            reconcil.fk_result_employees_dept_id\n        ;\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Step 3: Build summary dashboard via PROC SQL --- */\n    proc sql;\n        create table reconcil.migration_dashboard as\n        select\n            "&batch_id"     as batch_id length=30,\n            "&run_date"     as run_date length=10,\n            &total_checks   as total_checks,\n            &passed_checks  as passed_checks,\n            &failed_checks  as failed_checks,\n            case\n                when &total_checks > 0\n                    then &passed_checks / &total_checks * 100\n                else 0\n            end as pass_rate format=8.2,\n            case\n                when calculated pass_rate >= 100 then 'CERTIFIED'\n                when calculated pass_rate >= 95  then 'CONDITIONAL'\n                when calculated pass_rate >= 80  then 'REVIEW_REQUIRED'\n                else 'FAILED'\n            end as migration_status length=20\n        ;\n    quit;\n\n    /* --- Step 4: Compute overall migration quality score --- */\n    data reconcil.quality_score;\n        set reconcil.migration_dashboard;\n\n        /* Weighted scoring components */\n        count_weight  = 0.30;\n        column_weight = 0.30;\n        sum_weight    = 0.25;\n        fk_weight     = 0.15;\n\n        /* Use pass rate as the quality score basis */\n        quality_score = pass_rate;\n\n        /* Determine go-live recommendation */\n        length recommendation $100;\n        if quality_score >= 100 then\n            recommendation =\n                'Migration validated. Proceed to go-live.';\n        else if quality_score >= 95 then\n            recommendation =\n                'Minor issues found. Review and remediate before go-live.';\n        else if quality_score >= 80 then\n            recommendation =\n                'Significant issues. Re-run migration for affected tables.';\n        else\n            recommendation =\n                'Migration failed validation. Full re-migration required.';\n\n        batch_id  = "&batch_id";\n        run_date  = "&run_date";\n        scored_at = put(datetime(), datetime20.);\n    run;\n\n    /* --- Step 5: Generate formatted PDF report via ODS --- */\n    ods pdf file="/reports/migration/reconciliation_&batch_id..pdf"\n        style=journal;\n\n    ods proclabel 'Migration Reconciliation Summary';\n\n    title1 "Data Migration Reconciliation Report";\n    title2 "Batch: &batch_id | Date: &run_date";\n\n    /* Overall quality score and recommendation */\n    proc report data=reconcil.quality_score nowd;\n        columns batch_id run_date total_checks passed_checks\n                failed_checks pass_rate quality_score\n                migration_status recommendation;\n\n        define batch_id          / display 'Batch ID';\n        define run_date          / display 'Run Date';\n        define total_checks      / display 'Total Checks';\n        define passed_checks     / display 'Passed';\n        define failed_checks     / display 'Failed';\n        define pass_rate         / display 'Pass Rate (%)' format=8.2;\n        define quality_score     / display 'Quality Score' format=8.2;\n        define migration_status  / display 'Status';\n        define recommendation    / display 'Recommendation' width=50;\n\n        compute migration_status;\n            if migration_status = 'FAILED' then\n                call define(_col_, 'style',\n                    'style=[color=red font_weight=bold]');\n            else if migration_status = 'CERTIFIED' then\n                call define(_col_, 'style',\n                    'style=[color=green font_weight=bold]');\n        endcomp;\n    run;\n\n    /* Row count reconciliation detail */\n    title3 "Section 1: Row Count Reconciliation";\n\n    proc report data=reconcil.all_count_results nowd;\n        columns table_name src_count tgt_count diff pct_diff status;\n\n        define table_name / display 'Table';\n        define src_count  / display 'Source Rows' format=comma12.;\n        define tgt_count  / display 'Target Rows' format=comma12.;\n        define diff       / display 'Difference'  format=comma12.;\n        define pct_diff   / display '% Diff'      format=8.4;\n        define status     / display 'Status';\n\n        compute status;\n            if status = 'FAIL' then\n                call define(_row_, 'style',\n                    'style=[background=lightyellow]');\n        endcomp;\n    run;\n\n    /* Referential integrity detail */\n    title3 "Section 2: Referential Integrity Validation";\n\n    proc report data=reconcil.all_fk_results nowd;\n        columns parent_table child_table fk_column orphan_count status;\n\n        define parent_table  / display 'Parent Table';\n        define child_table   / display 'Child Table';\n        define fk_column     / display 'FK Column';\n        define orphan_count  / display 'Orphan Records' format=comma12.;\n        define status        / display 'Status';\n\n        compute status;\n            if status = 'FAIL' then\n                call define(_row_, 'style',\n                    'style=[background=lightyellow]');\n        endcomp;\n    run;\n\n    title;\n    ods pdf close;\n\n    %put NOTE: Reconciliation report saved to /reports/migration/;\n%mend generate_reconciliation_report;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 3: Main Program \u2014 Execute Migration Validation Suite              */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n%put NOTE: Migration Validation Suite \u2014 Batch &batch_id;\n%put NOTE: Run Date: &run_date;\n%put NOTE: Tolerance: &tolerance (&tol_type);\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n\n/* ----- Phase 1: Row Count Reconciliation for all 8 tables ------------ */\n%put NOTE: --- Phase 1: Count Reconciliation ---;\n\n%macro run_count_checks;\n    %do i = 1 %to &n_tables;\n        %count_reconcile(table=&&table&i);\n\n        /* Abort on critical system errors */\n        %if &syserr > 4 %then %do;\n            %put ERROR: System error during count check for &&table&i..;\n            %let migration_rc = 1;\n        %end;\n    %end;\n%mend run_count_checks;\n\n%run_count_checks;\n\n/* ----- Phase 2: Column Comparison for 4 critical tables -------------- */\n%put NOTE: --- Phase 2: Column Comparison ---;\n\n%column_compare(table=customers,\n    key_cols=customer_id,\n    compare_cols=first_name last_name email phone status);\n\n%column_compare(table=accounts,\n    key_cols=account_id,\n    compare_cols=account_type balance open_date status);\n\n%column_compare(table=products,\n    key_cols=product_id,\n    compare_cols=product_name category unit_price active_flag);\n\n%column_compare(table=orders,\n    key_cols=order_id,\n    compare_cols=order_date customer_id total_amount status);\n\n/* ----- Phase 3: Sum Reconciliation for 3 financial tables ------------ */\n%put NOTE: --- Phase 3: Sum Reconciliation ---;\n\n%sum_reconcile(table=transactions,\n    key_cols=account_id,\n    amount_cols=debit_amount credit_amount balance,\n    tolerance=&tolerance);\n\n%sum_reconcile(table=orders,\n    key_cols=customer_id,\n    amount_cols=total_amount tax_amount discount_amount,\n    tolerance=&tolerance);\n\n%sum_reconcile(table=order_lines,\n    key_cols=order_id,\n    amount_cols=line_total unit_price,\n    tolerance=&tolerance);\n\n/* ----- Phase 4: Referential Integrity for 5 FK relationships --------- */\n%put NOTE: --- Phase 4: Referential Integrity ---;\n\n%referential_integrity(parent_table=customers,\n    child_table=orders,\n    fk_col=customer_id);\n\n%referential_integrity(parent_table=orders,\n    child_table=order_lines,\n    fk_col=order_id);\n\n%referential_integrity(parent_table=products,\n    child_table=order_lines,\n    fk_col=product_id);\n\n%referential_integrity(parent_table=accounts,\n    child_table=transactions,\n    fk_col=account_id);\n\n%referential_integrity(parent_table=departments,\n    child_table=employees,\n    fk_col=dept_id);\n\n/* ----- Phase 5: Generate Reconciliation Report ----------------------- */\n%put NOTE: --- Phase 5: Reconciliation Report ---;\n\n%if &migration_rc = 0 %then %do;\n    %generate_reconciliation_report;\n%end;\n%else %do;\n    %put ERROR: Skipping report generation due to earlier system errors.;\n    %put ERROR: Review log for details. Batch: &batch_id;\n%end;\n\n/* ========================================================================= */\n/* SECTION 4: Final Status Logging and Cleanup                               */\n/* ========================================================================= */\n\n/* Persist final validation status to reconciliation library */\ndata reconcil.validation_log;\n    length batch_id $30 status $20 detail $200;\n    batch_id = "&batch_id";\n    run_date = "&run_date";\n    total    = &total_checks;\n    passed   = &passed_checks;\n    failed   = &failed_checks;\n\n    if failed = 0 then\n        status = 'ALL_PASSED';\n    else\n        status = 'HAS_FAILURES';\n\n    detail = catx(' ',\n        'Checks:', strip(put(total, best.)),\n        '| Passed:', strip(put(passed, best.)),\n        '| Failed:', strip(put(failed, best.)));\n\n    scored_ts = datetime();\n    format scored_ts datetime20.;\nrun;\n\n/* Clean up temporary work datasets */\nproc datasets lib=work nolist nowarn;\n    delete _compare_: _sum_src_: _sum_tgt_:;\nquit;\n\n/* ---- Final summary messages ---- */\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n%put NOTE: Migration Validation Complete;\n%put NOTE: Batch: &batch_id;\n%put NOTE: Total Checks: &total_checks;\n%put NOTE: Passed: &passed_checks | Failed: &failed_checks;\n%put NOTE: ============================================================;\n\n/* Reset debugging options */\noptions nomprint nomlogic nosymbolgen;\n-gold_meta21]

the batch start event.                                                */\n/* Parameters:                                                             */\n/*   batch_id \u2014 unique identifier for this batch execution                 */\n/* --------------------------------------------------------------------- */\n%macro init_batch(batch_id=);\n    %local start_ts n_pending;\n\n    %let start_ts = %sysfunc(datetime(), datetime20.);\n\n    %put NOTE: ============================================================;\n    %put NOTE: Batch Processing Framework \u2014 Initialization;\n    %put NOTE: Batch ID   : &batch_id;\n    %put NOTE: Start Time : &start_ts;\n    %put NOTE: Max Retries: &max_retries;\n    %put NOTE: ============================================================;\n\n    /* = 'PENDING';\n    quit;\n\n    /* Set global tracking variables */\n    %let total_files = &n_pending;\n    %let files_success = 0;\n    %let files_failed = 0;\n    %let batch_rc = 0;\n\n    %put
